title: GA-NIFS & JADES: Confirmation of pristine gas near GN-z11
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures; submitted to A&A; comments welcome
summary: According to the leading cosmological model, a first generation of stars called Population III (PopIII), condensed almost entirely out of hydrogen and helium, must have initiated the creation of all heavier chemical elements. Here we report the detection of ionised hydrogen (H$γ_{4342}$) with $S/N$=5.9 in a region about 3 pkpc (projected) North-East from the z~10.6 galaxy GN-z11, where line emission compatible with doubly ionised helium (HeII$_{1640}$) had been found. Our new JWST/NIRSpec-IFS G395H data confirm the authenticity of the previous detection, at a redshift of $z_{\rm Hγ}$=$10.5862$$\pm$$0.0003$. H$δ$ is marginally detected ($S/N$$\sim$$2$). No metal lines are detected in our observations spanning $λ_{\rm rest}$=$0.25$-$0.45μ$m. We derive a $3σ$ upper limit on the gas phase metallicity of 12+log(O/H)$<$6.96 ($Z_{\rm gas}$$<$$0.019~Z_\odot$). Through comparison with NIRCam imaging, we constrain a lower limit on the equivalent width of EW$_0$(H$γ$)$>$350Å. We compare our emission line constraints to model predictions and find them compatible with photoionization by PopIII stars, possibly intermixed with next-generation (PopII) stars. We infer an upper limit on the dynamical mass of $M_{\rm dyn}$$\lesssim$$3$$\times$$10^8M_\odot$. Our data provide novel support for the presence of PopIII stars nearby GN-z11, 440 Myr after the Big Bang.

AI.tldr: 在红移z~10.6的星系GN-z11附近3 pkpc处检测到无金属污染的电离氢(Hγ)和氦(HeII)发射线，为宇宙大爆炸后440 Myr存在第三星族(PopIII)恒星提供了直接证据。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过探测高红移(z~10.6)星系GN-z11附近区域的电离氢(Hγ)和双电离氦(HeII)发射线，验证宇宙早期第一代恒星(第三族恒星PopIII)存在的理论预测。
AI.data: 研究使用了JWST（詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜）的NIRSpec-IFS G395H数据，并参考了NIRCam成像数据。
AI.method: 采用JWST/NIRSpec-IFS G395H光谱仪进行近红外积分场光谱观测，结合Hγ和HeII谱线分析及气体相金属丰度上限测定。
AI.result: 在GN-z11附近检测到与第三族恒星(PopIII)相符的电离氢(H$γ_{4342}$)和双电离氦(HeII$_{1640}$)发射线，支持大爆炸后440 Myr存在第三族恒星活动。

title: The search for Population III: Confirmation of a HeII emitter with no metal lines at z=10.6
comment: Submitted to MNRAS, 12 pages, 9 figures, Table 1
summary: We report the confirmation of a HeII$λ$1640 emitter located at 3 pkpc from the galaxy GN-z11, at z=10.6. The detection, based on JWST NIRSpec-IFU high-resolution spectroscopy, confirms a previous claim based on medium-resolution spectroscopy. The HeII$λ$1640 identification is further supported by the independent detection of H$γ$ obtained by Übler et al. (2026) at the same location. The HeII emission is spectrally resolved in two components separated by 120 km/s. The Equivalent Width of the HeII emission is extremely high ($>$20 A). No metal lines are detected. Population III stars appear to be the most plausible explanation for the observed HeII emission. We also discuss the possible contribution from a Direct Collapse Black Hole, or a Primordial Black Hole - these scenarios are less plausible, but cannot be ruled out completely.

AI.tldr: 在红移z=10.6的GN-z11星系附近3 pkpc处确认了一个具有极高等效宽度（>20 Å）且光谱分裂为120 km/s双成分的HeII$λ$1640发射体，最可能由第三族恒星（Population III stars）产生。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于利用JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）NIRSpec-IFU高分辨率光谱在红移z=10.6处探测并确认GN-z11星系附近3 pkpc处的HeII$λ$1640发射体及其起源机制。
AI.data: 数据来源为JWST（詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜）NIRSpec-IFU（近红外光谱仪积分场单元）高分辨率光谱观测数据以及Übler等人（2026年）在同一位置独立探测到的H$γ$数据。
AI.method: 基于JWST NIRSpec-IFU高分辨率光谱分析确认了HeII$λ$1640发射线并解析出其光谱双峰结构。
AI.result: 在z=10.6的GN-z11星系附近3 pkpc处确认存在一个HeII$λ$1640发射体，其等效宽度极高（$>$20 A），且未检测到金属线，最可能由第三族恒星（Population III stars）产生。

title: The Pristine HeII Emitter near GN-z11: Constraining the Mass Distribution of the First Stars
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, submitted to ApJL
summary: The properties of the first metal-free stars remain largely unknown, and so far, the only data-driven constraints on their mass distribution (IMF) come from near-field cosmology. Here, we interpret new observations of the C1 and C2 components of Hebe, the HeII emitter near the galaxy GN-z11. Using a locally calibrated model, we robustly confirm the pristine (PopIII) nature of both components, showing that the measured upper limits on metal lines can only be reproduced by galaxies with $>50\%$ of their stellar mass in PopIII stars. We find that C1 is consistent with a purely PopIII system and adopt a simple parametric approach to infer the implications for the PopIII IMF and stellar mass. The observed $\rm HeII/H_γ$ ratio excludes steep IMFs, favoring top-heavy distributions, especially for young stellar ages ($\leq 1$ Myr). Combined with the HeII luminosity, this implies a total PopIII stellar mass of $2 \cdot 10^4 < M_\star/M_\odot < 6 \cdot 10^5$. While degeneracies between IMF, stellar mass, and age remain, adopting the lower stellar masses predicted by simulations ($M_\star < 10^5\,M_\odot$) strengthens the preference for top-heavy IMFs. Combining these results with near-field constraints, which instead exclude the flattest IMFs, we define a data-driven range of viable PopIII IMFs, linking characteristic mass and slope. This work demonstrates that direct observations of high-$z$ PopIII systems can place independent constraints on the IMF of the first stars, opening a new window on their formation and properties.

AI.tldr: 通过观测GN-z11附近HeII发射体Hebe的C1和C2组分并分析其HeII/Hγ比，首次直接证实了二者为无金属(原初恒星PopIII)系统，排除了陡峭初始质量函数(IMF)的可能性，支持顶部较重(top-heavy)分布，并约束其总恒星质量范围为2×10⁴至6×10⁵太阳质量，为原初恒星形成和性质研究提供了独立观测依据。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过观测高红移(z)第三星族恒星(PopIII)系统直接约束第一代无金属恒星的初始质量函数(IMF)及其形成特性。
AI.data: 数据来源于对GN-z11星系附近HeII发射体Hebe的C1和C2组分的新观测（near-field cosmology），并结合局部校准模型进行分析。
AI.method: 采用局部校准模型（locally calibrated model）和简单参数化方法（parametric approach）分析HeII发射体Hebe的C1和C2组分，通过测量HeII/Hγ比值和HeII光度约束第一代恒星（PopIII）的初始质量函数（IMF）及恒星质量。
AI.result: 观测到的$\rm HeII/H_γ$比值排除了陡峭的初始质量函数（IMF），支持顶部较重（top-heavy）的分布，尤其是对于年轻恒星年龄（$\leq 1$ Myr）。

title: Probing Atomic Dark Matter with Stellar Streams in Milky Way-Mass Galaxies
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures, 1 appendix, animations are available at http://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5IS42ggFs2iFXRQ8uSj1ZfRUGwdibxMM
summary: We present the first detailed analysis of the effects of dissipative dark matter on stellar streams. As a concrete example, we generate a cosmological hydrodynamic zoom-in simulation of a Milky Way-mass galaxy, assuming that the dark matter consists of Cold Dark Matter (CDM) with a sub-component ($\sim6\%$) of Atomic Dark Matter (ADM). The ADM subcomponent behaves as collisional, efficiently dissipative gas and allows for the formation of dense compact objects that enhance the central density of satellite galaxies, making them more resistant to tidal disruption. We show that stellar streams with stellar mass $M_{\rm{tot}, \star} \gtrsim 10^{5.5} \ \text{M}_\odot$ form later and exhibit prolonged star formation throughout their evolution, as compared to their CDM counterparts. Changes to star formation history are reflected on the chemical tracks of the stellar stream stars, where the youngest have enhanced [Fe/H] and [Mg/Fe] in the presence of ADM. Furthermore, a population of low-mass satellites with high ADM mass fractions is identified at low pericenter distances, which may affect the population of streams at $M_{\rm{tot}, \star} \lesssim 10^{5.5} \ \text{M}_\odot$. The results of this study should generalize to other dark matter models that lead to inner-density enhancements in satellites, such as elastic self-interacting dark matter in the gravothermal collapse regime.

AI.tldr: 首次揭示了耗散暗物质（ADM）对恒星流（stellar streams）的影响，发现ADM通过增强卫星星系中心密度使其更抗潮汐瓦解，导致恒星质量≥10^5.5 M⊙的恒星流形成更晚且持续恒星形成，并改变了恒星化学丰度轨迹（[Fe/H]和[Mg/Fe]），同时在低近心距处识别出高ADM质量分数的小质量卫星群。
AI.background: 研究探讨了耗散暗物质（ADM）对恒星流（stellar streams）动力学和化学演化的影响，重点比较了冷暗物质（CDM）与含ADM子成分的暗物质模型下恒星流形成和演化的差异。
AI.data: 采用宇宙学流体动力学放大模拟（cosmological hydrodynamic zoom-in simulation）数据，假设暗物质由冷暗物质（CDM）和原子暗物质（ADM，占比约6%）组成，其中ADM表现为碰撞性高效耗散气体。
AI.method: 采用宇宙学流体动力学放大模拟（cosmological hydrodynamic zoom-in simulation），假设暗物质由冷暗物质（CDM）和原子暗物质（ADM）子组分构成，研究ADM作为碰撞性耗散气体对恒星流的影响。
AI.result: 在ADM（Atomic Dark Matter）模型中，恒星质量$M_{\rm{tot}, \star} \gtrsim 10^{5.5} \ \text{M}_\odot$的恒星流形成较晚且演化过程中持续经历更长时间的恒星形成活动，其最年轻成员表现出[Fe/H]和[Mg/Fe]的化学丰度增强。

authors: J. F. J. van den Brand
title: Advanced Virgo Plus for O5 -- Design Report Overview
summary: This document presents an overview of the design, implementation, and expected performance of the Advanced Virgo Plus (AdV+) upgrades in view of the O5 observing run. Following the experience gained during the O4 commissioning and operations, the Virgo Collaboration has revised the upgrade strategy to address limitations associated with marginally stable recycling cavities. The O5 upgrade program combines elements from the original AdV+ Phase II project with new design solutions, including the implementation of stable recycling cavities, a major modification to the central interferometer layout, and a comprehensive renewal of critical subsystems. The planned upgrades are organized in two steps, targeting progressive improvements in operational stability, noise reduction, and detector sensitivity. Key developments include new vacuum infrastructures, suspensions, mirrors, optical configurations, quantum noise reduction systems, and high-power laser technologies. The resulting configuration is expected to significantly enhance the interferometer performance, enabling a substantial increase in astrophysical reach and scientific return during O5.

AI.tldr: Advanced Virgo Plus（AdV+）升级通过稳定回收腔（stable recycling cavities）、核心干涉仪布局改造及关键子系统更新，显著提升了O5观测期干涉仪性能（operational stability）、噪声抑制（noise reduction）和灵敏度（detector sensitivity），从而扩大天体物理探测范围（astrophysical reach）和科学回报（scientific return）。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于提升高级室女座干涉仪（Advanced Virgo Plus）性能的升级策略，以应对O5观测期需求。
AI.data: 数据来源包括升级后的稳定回收腔（stable recycling cavities）、改进的中央干涉仪布局、关键子系统更新、新型真空基础设施、悬挂系统、镜面、光学配置、量子降噪系统以及高功率激光技术。
AI.method: 采用稳定回收腔（stable recycling cavities）、改进中心干涉仪布局及更新关键子系统的综合升级方案，结合量子降噪系统和高功率激光技术提升探测器性能。
AI.result: 升级后的高级室女座探测器（Advanced Virgo Plus）通过稳定回收腔（stable recycling cavities）、核心干涉仪布局改造及关键子系统更新，显著提升了运行稳定性、噪声抑制能力和探测灵敏度。

title: Improved dark matter measurements with flexible modeling of resolved strongly-lensed quasar narrow-line emission
comment: 13 pages, 13 figures, submitted to PRD
summary: The relative brightnesses of strongly lensed quasar images, called flux ratios, respond to perturbations from low-mass dark matter halos, enabling tests of dark matter models. The quasar narrow-line region (NLR) is ideal for flux-ratio studies: large enough to be insensitive to stellar microlensing, yet compact enough to remain sensitive to dark matter halo substructure. While nuclear emission dominates NLR flux, many quasars show low surface brightness extended emission spanning kiloparsec scales that could bias measurements. To test this potential bias, we generated mock Keck OSIRIS AO observations of seven $z<1$, $L_\mathrm{bol}\sim10^{46}$\,erg\,s$^{-1}$ quasars characteristic of sources. Only one system shows detectable extended emission after lensing. We introduce a new pipeline for simultaneously fitting point sources (nuclear) + Sérsic elliptical profiles (extended [O\,III]). We show that we recover the true flux-ratios to $<5\%$ even when the extended emission is boosted to 100 times its original flux. We also demonstrate that visual inspection of lenses reliably determines whether to use point-source-only or include extended emission modeling in the pipeline; both achieve $<5\%$ accuracy -- which is below the typical spectral fitting precision. The new pipeline and fitting procedure ensures reliable flux-ratio measurements can be made of narrow-line flux ratios for the thousands of lenses which will be discovered by Euclid, Rubin and Roman Space Telescopes.

AI.tldr: 通过模拟观测和开发新数据处理流程，验证了在强引力透镜类星体窄线区(NLR)流量比(flux ratio)测量中，即使存在千秒差距尺度延展辐射，核区点源模型仍能确保暗物质子结构探测精度优于5%。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用强引力透镜类星体窄线区（NLR）的流量比（flux ratios）探测低质量暗物质晕（dark matter halos）的扰动效应，以检验暗物质模型。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源是模拟的凯克（Keck）OSIRIS自适应光学（AO）观测数据，模拟对象为七个红移小于1、光度约10^46 erg/s的类星体。
AI.method: 采用核心分析方法为模拟凯克(Keck) OSIRIS自适应光学(AO)观测并结合点源(核区)与Sérsic椭圆轮廓(扩展[O III]发射)同步拟合的新流程。
AI.result: result：新开发的管线（pipeline）和拟合程序能确保在窄线区（NLR）通量比测量中实现<5%的精度，适用于欧几里得（Euclid）、鲁宾（Rubin）和罗曼（Roman Space Telescopes）望远镜将发现的数千个透镜系统。

title: Isolated or Dynamical? Tracing Black Hole Binary Formation through the Population of Gravitational-Wave Sources
comment: 22 pages of main text, 7 pages of appendices, subm. to PRD
summary: The population of binary black hole (BBH) mergers observed by the LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA (LVK) collaboration offers a window into the cosmic evolution of compact binaries and their formation. We employ the semi-analytic population-synthesis code B-POP to model BBHs assembled through isolated binary evolution and dynamical interactions in young, globular, and nuclear star clusters. Our framework incorporates star formation history, metallicity evolution, and single and binary stellar evolution to quantify their impact on the observable properties of the BBH population and on the relative contribution of distinct formation channels. Our models are characterized by a merger rate, $\mathcal{R} = 17.5-24.1\mathrm{Gpc}^{-3}\mathrm{yr}^{-1}$, broadly consistent with LVK constraints. Moreover, the predicted distributions of primary mass, mass ratio, and effective inspiral spin parameter are compatible with those inferred from current LVK observations. Our primary-mass distribution is dominated by isolated binaries at $m_1 < 20$ M$_\odot$, while dynamically assembled first- and higher-generation mergers dominate at larger masses. As a consequence, the sub-population of mergers with $m_1 > 45$ M$_\odot$ exhibits a nearly flat mass-ratio distribution and distinctive spin properties. We leverage our models to explore how: (i) the fraction of stars in isolated binaries and the fraction of stellar mass bound in clusters regulate the merger rate; (ii) common-envelope physics shapes the primary-mass distribution and its redshift evolution; (iii) the inclusion of stellar-collision products enhances the formation of higher-generation mergers; and (iv) the natal spin distribution influences the effective spin. Using our models to assess possible origins of selected GW events, we illustrate how the complexity of the underlying astrophysical processes can hinder the possibility to draw definitive conclusions.

AI.tldr: 通过半解析群体合成代码B-POP模拟孤立双星演化和动力学相互作用形成的双黑洞（BBH）合并事件，发现孤立双星主导主质量小于20 M$_\odot$的合并，而动力学过程主导更大质量合并，且主质量大于45 M$_\odot$的子群体呈现平坦的质量比分布和独特自旋特性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过半解析群体合成方法（semi-analytic population synthesis）模拟双黑洞（BBH）合并群体的形成机制与宇宙学演化，揭示孤立双星演化与星团动力学相互作用对双黑洞可观测特性的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源于半解析群体合成代码B-POP（B-POP）模拟的孤立双星演化和年轻、球状及核星团中动力学相互作用形成的双黑洞（BBH）群体。
AI.method: 采用半解析群体合成代码B-POP（B-POP）模拟孤立双星演化和动力学相互作用（dynamical interactions）在年轻星团、球状星团及核星团中形成的双黑洞（BBH）群体，并结合恒星形成历史、金属丰度演化及单星与双星演化过程量化其对双黑洞群体可观测特性及不同形成通道相对贡献的影响。
AI.result: 通过半解析群体合成代码B-POP模拟发现，孤立双星演化主导了主质量小于20 M$_\odot$的双黑洞并合事件，而动力学组装的第一代及更高代并合在更大质量区间占据主导地位。

title: DETECT: A Pipeline to Quantify Detection Thresholds in Rubin for Nearby Targets Embedded in Bright Host Galaxies
comment: 26 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables
summary: The final stages of stellar evolution can be constrained by studying pre-SN variability. The incredible amount of data coming from the upcoming Rubin Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) will be fundamental to this type of work. However, robustly measuring pre-SN variability can be hard, as even state-of-the-art image subtraction pipelines struggle when the target is embedded in a bright nearby galaxy. We developed Detection Efficiency and Threshold Estimation for Characterization of Transients (DETECT) to tackle this problem. It performs a series of source injection, image subtraction, and forced photometry to obtain reliable detection thresholds tailored to a specific location within a given host galaxy. We first validate the pipeline using simulated data from Rubin DP0 and then apply it to a sample of 15 targets found in Rubin DP1. We demonstrate that DETECT is capable of identifying pre-SN variability while calculating reliable upper limits and suppressing false positives for targets embedded in bright host galaxies. Most of the false positives in this work occurred when the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) was between 5 and 10, while no false positives were found when the SNR was greater than 10. Finally, even though DETECT was originally developed in the context of pre-SN variability, it is broadly applicable to any situation where detections are uncertain and robust upper limits are needed.

AI.tldr: 开发了DETECT方法（Detection Efficiency and Threshold Estimation for Characterization of Transients），通过源注入、图像差分和强制测光技术，在明亮宿主星系中可靠检测超新星前身（pre-SN）变源并计算上限阈值，有效抑制了信噪比（SNR）5-10区间的假阳性。
AI.background: 研究主题聚焦于利用超新星前身(pre-SN)变率观测约束恒星演化的最终阶段。
AI.data: 数据来源包括鲁宾天文台（Rubin Observatory）的遗产时空巡天（Legacy Survey of Space and Time, LSST）模拟数据（DP0）和实测数据（DP1）。
AI.method: 开发了检测效率和阈值估计工具（DETECT），通过源注入（source injection）、图像差分（image subtraction）和强制测光（forced photometry）序列来获取特定宿主星系位置的可靠检测阈值。
AI.result: 开发的方法DETECT能可靠识别前身星(pre-SN)变率，计算严格上限并抑制亮宿主星系内目标的假阳性。

title: Probing the stochastic signal from primordial gravitational waves with pulsar timing arrays
summary: In this study, we investigate the scenario in which the stochastic signal arises from primordial gravitational waves. Within this framework, we consider two distinct possibilities: one in which the pulsar timing arrays (PTAs) signal corresponds to a stochastic gravitational-wave background (SGWB), and one in which it does not. Primordial gravitational waves can generate an SGWB spanning an exceptionally broad frequency range and are also a source of B-mode polarization in the cosmic microwave background (CMB). We combine CMB B-mode polarization data from BICEP/Keck (BK18), Planck (Planck18), and baryon acoustic oscillation (BAO) measurements with SGWB limits from PTAs to derive updated constraints on the tensor spectral index of the primordial power spectrum. Under the assumption of no detection of an SGWB from PTAs, the allowed parameter space excludes a large portion of the positive region. The constraint within PTA limits is $n_t= -0.165^{+1.20}_{-1.56}$ at $95\%$ confidence level, which are consistent with those obtained from the combined BK18+Planck18+BAO dataset, leading to tighter constraints on the tensor spectral index. Conversely, if the PTA signal is interpreted as an SGWB, the likelihood distribution for the tensor spectral index favors positive values, with $n_t= 2.39^{+1.46}_{-1.35}$ at $95\%$ confidence level, providing evidence for a blue-tilted primordial gravitational-wave power spectrum. In this case, the allowed parameter space excludes the negative region.

AI.tldr: 研究通过结合脉冲星计时阵（PTAs）、宇宙微波背景（CMB）B模偏振和重子声学振荡（BAO）数据，更新了对原初引力波功率谱张量谱指数（tensor spectral index）的约束：未探测到随机引力波背景（SGWB）时排除大部分正值区域（$n_t= -0.165^{+1.20}_{-1.56}$），而将PTA信号解释为SGWB时支持蓝倾谱（$n_t= 2.39^{+1.46}_{-1.35}$）并排除负值区域。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于原初引力波（primordial gravitational waves）产生的随机信号及其对宇宙微波背景（CMB）B模极化和脉冲星计时阵（PTAs）观测的随机引力波背景（SGWB）的影响。
AI.data: 使用了来自BICEP/Keck (BK18)、Planck (Planck18)的宇宙微波背景(CMB)B模偏振数据、重子声学振荡(BAO)测量数据以及脉冲星计时阵(PTAs)的随机引力波背景(SGWB)限制数据。
AI.method: 采用宇宙微波背景（CMB）B模偏振数据（BK18、Planck18）和重子声学振荡（BAO）测量结合脉冲星计时阵（PTAs）的随机引力波背景（SGWB）限制，推导原始功率谱张量谱指数（tensor spectral index）的更新约束。
AI.result: result：在PTA信号未被检测为随机引力波背景（SGWB）时，张量谱指数（n_t）约束为-0.165^{+1.20}_{-1.56}（95%置信水平），排除了大部分正值区域；若PTA信号被视为SGWB，则张量谱指数倾向于正值（n_t=2.39^{+1.46}_{-1.35}），支持蓝倾原初引力波功率谱并排除负值区域。

title: Beyond compactness: a structural-dynamical-evolutionary manifold for the stellar-to-dynamical mass ratio in ultra-compact massive galaxies
comment: 13 pages, including Appendix, 9 figures, accepted for publication by A&A
summary: Ultra-compact massive galaxies (UCMGs) exhibit elevated stellar-to-dynamical mass ratios when dynamical masses are estimated using standard virial prescriptions. This discrepancy has been interpreted as non-homology driven by their compactness. This study investigates how the stellar-to-dynamical mass ratio depends on compactness (C), velocity dispersion ($σ_*$), stellar population properties (age, metallicity, and [Mg/Fe]), and star formation histories (SFHs). The analysis is based on a homogeneous sample of 482 UCMGs from the INSPIRE and E-INSPIRE surveys, extending to smaller sizes than previously analysed samples. I first derive the compactness-mass relation assuming a constant virial coefficient (K=5). I then correct stellar masses for IMF variations and recompute stellar-to-dynamical mass ratios using an empirical prescription where the virial coefficient varies with radius and stellar mass. Finally, I test modulation by stellar kinematics and population properties, including the degree of relicness (DoR), quantifiying the extremeness of the SFH. A statistically significant anti-correlation between compactness and the IMF-corrected stellar-to-dynamical mass ratio is recovered under a constant virial coefficient, but the relation flattens when a structure-dependent K is adopted. The data define a structural-dynamical manifold in the logC-log$σ_*$ space. Velocity dispersion sets the dominant axis of variation, and the corresponding plane accounts for ~62% of the variance in stellar-to-dynamical mass ratio. The stellar-to-dynamical mass ratio in UCMGs is governed primarily by the depth of the gravitational potential traced by $σ_*$, rather than C alone. At fixed size, systems with higher velocity dispersion show lower stellar-to-dynamical mass ratios. Non-homology therefore reflects coupled dynamical and evolutionary processes rather than purely geometric compactness.

AI.tldr: 研究发现超致密大质量星系(UCMGs)的恒星与动力学质量比主要受速度弥散($σ_*$)表征的引力势深度调控，而非单纯由致密性(C)决定，揭示了非均匀性源于动力学与演化过程的耦合机制。
AI.background: 研究探讨了超致密大质量星系(UCMGs)中恒星与动力学质量比与致密性(C)、速度弥散($σ_*$)、恒星族性质及形成历史的关联机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于INSPIRE和E-INSPIRE巡天项目中482个超致密大质量星系(UCMGs)的同质样本。
AI.method: 采用经验性处方（empirical prescription）修正恒星初始质量函数（IMF）变化并重新计算恒星与动力学质量比，同时基于半径和恒星质量变化的位力系数（virial coefficient）进行动力学分析。
AI.result: 超致密大质量星系（UCMGs）的恒星与动力学质量比主要由引力势深度（由速度弥散$σ_*$表征）主导，而非单纯由致密性（C）决定。

title: Searching for Fast Astronomical Transients in Archival Photographic Plates
comment: 6 page, 2 figures
summary: Fast astronomical transients were observed by the VASCO Project (Villarroel et al 2020) in photographic sky surveys conducted in the 1950s. Those searches analyzed the Palomar Observatory Sky Survey (POSS-I and POSS-II) digitized plates. In this article, we present a preliminary report on a similar but independent search using archival plates taken at the Hamburg Observatory with the Großer Schmidtspiegel 1.2-m Schmidt camera, also from the mid-1950s. These plates were digitized by the APPLAUSE Archive, which provides both images and tables of detected objects. By analyzing pairs of plates taken in rapid sequence (about 30 minutes apart) of the same sky regions, we find evidence of transients similar to those previously reported by the VASCO Project for POSS plates. While the analysis is ongoing, one notable result is that our findings independently confirm that these transients exhibit systematically narrow full width at half maximum (FWHM) compared to stellar point spread functions. This provides further support for their interpretation as sub-second optical flashes, consistent with reflections from flat, rotating objects in orbit around Earth.

AI.tldr: 基于汉堡天文台历史底片独立发现与VASCO项目类似的亚秒级光学瞬变（transients），其半高全宽（FWHM）系统性窄于恒星点扩散函数，支持其为近地轨道扁平旋转物体反射的解释。
AI.background: 研究背景聚焦于利用20世纪50年代历史天文底片（photographic plates）搜寻快速天文暂现源（fast astronomical transients），特别是通过分析汉堡天文台（Hamburg Observatory）施密特相机（Schmidt camera）拍摄的连续底片对，独立验证VASCO项目此前在帕洛玛天文台（Palomar Observatory）底片中发现的亚秒级光学闪变现象（sub-second optical flashes）及其可能的地球轨道反射物（reflections from flat, rotating objects in orbit around Earth）解释。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于汉堡天文台（Hamburg Observatory）1.2米施密特相机（Großer Schmidtspiegel）在20世纪50年代中期拍摄的存档底片，这些底片由APPLAUSE档案库（APPLAUSE Archive）进行数字化处理并提供图像和检测到的天体表格。
AI.method: 采用快速序列拍摄的数字化底片对（间隔约30分钟）分析，通过比较瞬变源与恒星点扩散函数（PSF）的半高全宽（FWHM）差异，独立验证了其系统性更窄的特征。
AI.result: 在汉堡天文台（Hamburg Observatory）的1.2米施密特相机（Großer Schmidtspiegel）拍摄的数字化底片中发现了与VASCO项目（Villarroel et al 2020）类似的快速天文暂现源（fast astronomical transients），其半高全宽（FWHM）系统性窄于恒星点扩散函数（stellar point spread functions），进一步支持了这些暂现源是亚秒级光学闪光的解释，与地球轨道上平坦旋转物体的反射一致。

title: Field-Level Inference of Primordial Non-Gaussianity with the Quijote Simulation Suite
comment: 20 pages, 18 figures. Comments welcome!
summary: Local primordial non-Gaussianity, parameterised as $f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$, will be stringently constrained using state-of-the-art methods applied to next-generation galaxy redshift survey data. In this paper, in preparation for the upcoming data sets, we demonstrate for the first time the joint field-level inference of $f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$, nuisance parameters, and the initial conditions in realistic halo catalogues, ones which are generated through full dark-matter-only $N$-body simulations. The field-level inference algorithm optimally constrains $f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$ through a Bayesian forward-modelling approach at the field level, which outperforms traditional methods by leveraging the full statistical power of the data at the scales considered. In addition, we assess its performance under various design choices in the forward model, including tests of the structure formation model and resolution. We demonstrate the robustness of our approach by applying it to a subset of the \textit{Quijote} simulation suite, performing the inference at scales down to $k_{\rm max} \approx 0.1 h \rm{Mpc}^{-1}$. Compared with a power spectrum and bispectrum estimator, we find a $\sim1.3$ improvement in $σ(f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local})$ when applying \borg{}, while marginalising over the initial conditions and bias parameters. From the small-scale information sensitivity tests, we show that the constraints on $f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$ improve as we increase the resolution of the inference. These findings underscore the transformative potential of field-level inference to leverage the information available in ongoing surveys such as \textit{Euclid}, providing accurate insights into the physics of cosmic inflation and the number of fields driving it.

AI.tldr: 首次在真实暗物质晕目录中通过场级贝叶斯前向建模方法联合推断局域原初非高斯性参数（$f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$）、初始条件及系统参数，相比传统功率谱和双谱估计器将约束精度提升约1.3倍，并证实分辨率提高可进一步优化参数约束。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用下一代星系红移巡天数据，通过场级贝叶斯前向建模方法优化对局域原初非高斯性参数（local primordial non-Gaussianity, $f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$）的约束，以探索宇宙暴胀物理和多场驱动机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于暗物质专用N体模拟（dark-matter-only N-body simulations）生成的现实晕族目录（halo catalogues），并基于Quijote模拟套件（Quijote simulation suite）的子集进行推断，推断尺度达到$k_{\rm max} \approx 0.1 h \rm{Mpc}^{-1}$。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯场级前向建模方法（Bayesian forward-modelling approach at the field level）联合推断局部原初非高斯性参数（$f_{\rm NL}^{\rm local}$）、初始条件及 nuisance 参数，并基于暗物质N体模拟（dark-matter-only $N$-body simulations）生成的晕族目录验证模型分辨率与结构形成假设。
AI.result: 首次在真实暗物质晕目录中联合推断局部原初非高斯性参数(f_NL^local)、干扰参数和初始条件，验证了场级贝叶斯前向建模方法优于传统功率谱和双谱估计器，约束精度提升约1.3倍。

title: Observations of DNC and DCO$^+$ toward the $\int$-shaped Filament and Starless Cores in the Orion Molecular Clouds
comment: 33 pages, 19 figures, 5 tables, ApJS, in press
summary: Although the deuterium fraction is known to be a powerful evolutionary tracer, its variation within individual molecular cloud cores is still poorly understood. The northern $\int$-shaped filament and 20 individual starless cores in the Orion A and B clouds were mapped in the deuterated molecules of DNC and DCO$^+$ with the Receiver 7BEE installed on the Nobeyama 45~m radio telescope. In a ~ 5' X 30' map of the northern $\int$-shaped filament in the Orion A cloud, the DNC emission is detected over the filament, whereas the DCO$^+$ emission is localized toward OMC-3, the northernmost region of the filament. The difference in distribution between DNC and DCO$^+$ can be attributed to that between N- and C-bearing molecules as previously suggested by Tatematsu et al. High DNC/HN$^{13}$C column density ratios were observed in OMC-2 and OMC-3, and low ratios in OMC-1. It seems that OMC-2 and OMC-3 still contain molecular gas close to the onset of star formation. In 3' X 3' maps of the individual starless cores in Orion, the column density ratios of DNC/HN$^{13}$C and DCO$^+$/H$^{13}$CO$^+$ are found to be rather constant locally within each core, although the core-to-core variation is not small. Similar timescales of deuterization, depletion, and dynamical evolution might explain the locally constant ratio.

AI.tldr: 通过观测猎户座A和B分子云中北侧$\int$形纤维结构和20个无星核，发现DNC和DCO$^+$分布差异源于氮碳分子特性差异，且DNC/HN$^{13}$C柱密度比在OMC-2和OMC-3较高表明这些区域仍处于恒星形成起始阶段。
AI.background: 研究主题为利用氘代分子（DNC和DCO$^+$）的分布和丰度比（DNC/HN$^{13}$C和DCO$^+$/H$^{13}$CO$^+$）探索猎户座A和B分子云中单个无星核（starless cores）和$\int$形丝状结构的化学演化及恒星形成初始条件。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用野边山（Nobeyama）45米射电望远镜上的接收器7BEE对猎户座A和B云中的北部$\int$形细丝和20个独立无星核进行的DNC和DCO$^+$分子观测。
AI.method: 采用Nobeyama 45米射电望远镜的7BEE接收器对DNC和DCO$^+$分子进行成图观测。
AI.result: 在猎户座A云（Orion A）和B云（Orion B）中，DNC（氘代氰化氢）和DCO$^+$（氘代甲酰离子）的分布差异揭示了氮基（N-bearing）和碳基（C-bearing）分子的化学演化路径不同。

title: Astrophysics Research Organizations in the 21st Century: Database and Comparative Dashboards
comment: accepted after peer review for BAAS, 1949 Institutional and 64 Country Dashboards (and the full tables) are at 10.5281/zenodo.19136361
summary:
As many research papers in astronomy have been written since the beginning of the 21st century as had been written previously. This exponential growth has been accompanied by substantial changes in the structure of astrophysics research, which organizations perform it and where they are located. Using data from the Smithsonian/NASA Astrophysics Data System/Science Explorer (ADS/SciX) we have obtained an article number and citation based set of metrics as a function of the institutional affiliation of the first author; nearly every organization which has produced recent astronomy research is included.
  We use these data to examine changes in where astronomy research is being done. We demonstrate how to create custom rankings for the organizations. We develop a dashboard of key performance indicators (KPI) to examine the relative and absolute changes in the research performance for each of the 1949 organizations which have produced at least one first authored, refereed astronomy journal article since 1997. We also present KPI dashboards for 65 countries and three regions.

AI.tldr: 基于ADS/SciX数据分析了1949个天文研究机构（institution）和65个国家（country）的科研产出变化，开发了可定制排名和关键绩效指标（KPI）仪表盘。
AI.background: 21世纪以来天文学文献数量呈指数增长，同时天体物理学研究的组织结构、执行机构及地域分布发生显著变化。
AI.data: 数据来源于史密森尼/美国宇航局天体物理学数据系统/科学探索者（ADS/SciX），涵盖了自1997年以来几乎所有发表过天文学研究论文的机构。
AI.method: 采用基于文章数量和引用的指标集（metrics）分析机构和国家层面的天文学研究表现，并开发关键绩效指标（KPI）仪表盘进行可视化评估。
AI.result: 21世纪以来天文学论文数量与之前历史总和相当，且天体物理学研究结构、执行机构和地域分布发生显著变化。

title: Redshift Dipoles from Non-Geodesic Observer Congruences in Covariant Cosmology
summary:
In an inhomogeneous universe, the Hubble frame used to describe the cosmic expansion does not, in general, coincide with a geodesic matter flow. In this work, it is shown that within a fully covariant framework, a non-geodesic observer congruence introduces an additional contribution to the relation between affine parameter and observed redshift, proportional to the line-of-sight projection of the observer 4-acceleration. This induces a dipolar modulation of the redshift itself, which propagates to any observable expressed in redshift space.
  Unlike the standard kinematic dipole associated with a global Lorentz boost, this contribution is sourced by the kinematics of the observer congruence along the past light cone and can exhibit a non trivial redshift dependence. These results provide a direct framework to identify such signatures in cosmological data, with potential implications for the interpretation of large-scale dipoles and redshift-based inference.

AI.tldr: 研究发现非测地线观测者运动在宇宙膨胀的红移关系中引入了与观测者四维加速度视线投影成正比的额外贡献，导致红移空间出现由观测者沿过去光锥运动学特性驱动的非平凡红移依赖性偶极调制。
AI.background: 研究探讨了非均匀宇宙中哈勃参考系(Hubble frame)与测地物质流(geodesic matter flow)偏离时，观测者4维加速度对红移-仿射参数关系的额外贡献及其导致的偶极调制效应。
AI.data: 研究使用了基于完全协变框架（fully covariant framework）的理论模拟数据，分析了非测地线观测者汇（non-geodesic observer congruence）对红移关系的影响。
AI.method: 采用完全协变框架分析非测地观测者汇（observer congruence）对仿射参数与观测红移关系的额外贡献，重点考察观测者4-加速度（4-acceleration）的视线投影引起的红移空间偶极调制效应。
AI.result: 在非均匀宇宙中，非测地线观测者共动系会引入与观测者四维加速度视线投影成正比的附加项，导致红移空间出现偶极调制效应。

title: Radiative Compression of Dense Cores in the Pillars of Creation as Revealed by JWST Extinction Mapping
comment: 8 pages, 5 Figures, 1 table, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: The Pillars of Creation in M16 represent an iconic star-forming region where stellar feedback shapes molecular cloud evolution. We present a detailed investigation of dust extinction and density structure in the Pillars of Creation using multiband photometric observations from \emph{JWST} NIRCam. A high-resolution (2\arcsec) extinction map reaching depths of $A_V\sim 100$ mag has been constructed using NIRCam filters F090W, F200W, F335M, and F444W. This map clearly reveals the intricate structure of dense gas within the molecular cloud in the Pillars of Creation region. Analysis of the column density probability distribution function (N-PDF) exhibits a characteristic lognormal distribution at intermediate extinctions ($A_V\approx10-30$\,mag), which transitions to a power-law tail at high extinctions ($A_V\gtrsim$ 30\,mag) where star-forming cores reside. The power-law slope $α$ displays significant spatial variation, steepening from $α\approx 2.0$ at the pillar tips facing the NGC 6611 cluster to $α\approx$4.0 in regions distant from the cluster. This systematic gradient demonstrates that stellar feedback not only disperses molecular clouds but can also locally enhance the formation of dense, self-gravitating structures through radiative compression.

AI.tldr: 基于JWST NIRCam多波段观测构建了M16创生之柱(Pillars of Creation)高分辨率(2角秒)消光图，发现柱状结构内气体柱密度概率分布(N-PDF)从中等消光(A_V≈10-30星等)的对数正态分布过渡到高消光(A_V≳30星等)的幂律分布，且幂律斜率α从面向NGC 6611星团的柱尖(α≈2.0)向远离星团区域(α≈4.0)逐渐变陡，证实恒星反馈通过辐射压缩局部增强致密自引力结构的形成。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于恒星反馈（stellar feedback）对M16鹰状星云中创生之柱（Pillars of Creation）分子云演化的影响机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于JWST近红外相机（NIRCam）的多波段测光观测，包括F090W、F200W、F335M和F444W滤光片，构建了分辨率为2角秒、深度达$A_V\sim 100$星等的消光图。
AI.method: 采用多波段测光观测（JWST NIRCam）构建高分辨率（2角秒）消光图，并通过柱密度概率分布函数（N-PDF）分析揭示分子云密度结构的对数正态分布与幂律尾特征。
AI.result: 高分辨率消光图揭示了M16创生之柱区域分子云内致密气体的精细结构，柱密度概率分布函数在中等消光（$A_V\approx10-30$\,mag）呈对数正态分布，在高消光（$A_V\gtrsim$ 30\,mag）转为幂律尾。

title: Parallel Adaptive Reweighting Importance Sampling (PARIS)
summary: Efficiently sampling from high-dimensional, multi-modal posteriors is a central challenge in Bayesian inference for astrophysics, especially gravitational-wave astronomy. Popular families of methods like Markov-chain Monte Carlo, nested sampling, and importance sampling all rely on proposal distributions to guide exploration. Because prior knowledge of the target is often limited, practitioners can adopt adaptive proposals that iteratively refine themselves using information gained from previously drawn samples. Traditional adaptive strategies, however, struggle in high-dimensional multi-modal settings: complex, non-linear correlations are hard to capture, and hyperparameters typically require tedious, problem-specific tuning. To address these issues, we introduce Parallel Adaptive Reweighting Importance Sampling (PARIS). PARIS models its proposal as a Gaussian mixture whose component centers are the existing samples and whose component weights match the current importance weights. New draws from the proposal therefore concentrate around high-weight regions, while candidate points in unexplored areas receive intentionally inflated weights. As the algorithm continuously reweights all samples up to the latest proposal, any initial over-weighting self-corrects once additional neighbor samples are collected. To enable rapid reweighting, we present an efficient update scheme and evaluate PARIS on illustrative toy problems and more realistic gravitational-wave parameter estimation tasks. PARIS achieves accurate posterior reconstruction and evidence estimation with substantially fewer function evaluations than competing approaches, highlighting its promise for widespread use in astrophysical data analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出并行自适应重加权重要性采样（PARIS）方法，通过高斯混合模型（Gaussian mixture）动态调整采样权重，显著降低了引力波（gravitational-wave）参数估计等天体物理高维多模态后验分布的计算成本。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于解决天体物理学（尤其是引力波天文学）中高维多模态后验分布（high-dimensional, multi-modal posteriors）的高效采样难题。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源包括引力波参数估计任务中的观测数据（observational data）和用于验证的示例玩具问题（toy problems）模拟数据（simulation data）。
AI.method: 采用并行自适应重加权重要性采样（PARIS）方法，通过高斯混合模型（Gaussian mixture）构建动态更新的提议分布，利用现有样本作为分量中心、重要性权重作为分量权重，并引入高效重加权更新机制。
AI.result: PARIS（Parallel Adaptive Reweighting Importance Sampling）通过高斯混合模型（Gaussian mixture model）构建自适应提案分布，显著减少了高维多模态后验采样所需的目标函数计算次数，在引力波参数估计等任务中实现了精确的后验重构和证据估计。

title: Model-Independent Reconstruction of Quintessence Potential and Kinetic Energy from DESI DR2 and Pantheon+ Supernovae
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, accepted for publication on EPJC
summary: We present a model-independent reconstruction of the quintessence scalar field's dynamics-both its potential and kinetic energy-directly from the latest cosmological observations. Our analysis combines DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillation measurements with the Pantheon plus Type Ia supernova compilation, employing Gaussian process with four distinct covariance kernels to avoid theoretical priors on the potential's functional form. Key findings reveal a monotonically decreasing potential with redshift, consistent with thawing quintessence, and a kinetic energy that crosses zero near $z\sim 1$, marking the dark energy-matter equality epoch. Notably, while apparent negative kinetic energy values emerge at intermediate redshifts (0.5<z<1.0), these are statistical artifacts within uncertainties, arising from error amplification in derivative reconstruction rather than new physics. Our results demonstrate the power of non-parametric methods to constrain dynamical dark energy and show minimal dependence on the choice of cosmological priors, whether from local (SH0ES) or early-universe (Planck) measurements.

AI.tldr: 基于DESI DR2重子声学振荡和Pantheon+超新星数据，采用高斯过程无模型重建了精质场(quintessence)动力学演化，发现势能随红移单调递减符合解冻型精质场特征，动能于红移$z\sim 1$附近过零点对应暗能量-物质相等时期，中间红移(0.5<z<1.0)表观负动能源于导数重建误差而非新物理。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过非参数方法重建精质场（quintessence field）动力学特性，以探索动态暗能量（dynamical dark energy）的本质及其在宇宙演化中的作用。
AI.data: 数据来源于DESI DR2重子声波振荡（baryon acoustic oscillation）测量和Pantheon plus Ia型超新星（Type Ia supernova）汇编。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程（Gaussian process）结合四种不同协方差核函数对精质场（quintessence scalar field）动力学进行无模型依赖的非参数重建。
AI.result: 动力学重构揭示五元标量场（quintessence scalar field）势能随红移单调递减符合解冻型五元场特征，动能则在红移z∼1处穿越零点对应暗能量-物质平等时期。

title: The Extinction Distance of Supernova Remnants in Combination with the CO Line Measurements
comment: 21 pages, 15 figures; accepted for publication in AJ
summary: Accurate distance measurements to supernova remnants (SNRs) are crucial for understanding their physical properties and evolution. We present a novel method that combines CO line observations with three-dimensional (3D) extinction maps to determine distances to SNRs (G93.7$-$0.2, G109.1$-$1.0, G156.2+5.7, and G166.0+4.3) through their associated molecular clouds. For each SNR, candidate CO velocity components corresponding to interacting molecular clouds are identified based on previous observational evidence with refinements: [$-$19, $-$3] km s$^{-1}$ for G93.7$-$0.2, [$-$51, $-$46] km s$^{-1}$ for G109.1$-$1.0, [$-$10, 0] km s$^{-1}$ for G156.2+5.7, and [$-$27, $-$15] km s$^{-1}$ for G166.0+4.3. By examining extinction-distance profiles along the sightlines and identifying extinction jumps that spatially coincide with CO emission features, we derive distances of 1.82$\pm$0.13 kpc for G93.7$-$0.2, 3.05$\pm$0.15 kpc for G109.1$-$1.0, 0.60$\pm$0.15 kpc for G156.2+5.7, and 3.44$\pm$0.23 kpc for G166.0+4.3. Our extinction-based distances are largely consistent with previous estimates while with better accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合CO谱线观测与三维消光(3D extinction)地图的新方法，精确测定了四个超新星遗迹(G93.7$-$0.2、G109.1$-$1.0、G156.2+5.7和G166.0+4.3)的距离，结果分别为1.82$\pm$0.13、3.05$\pm$0.15、0.60$\pm$0.15和3.44$\pm$0.23千秒差距(kpc)，比先前估计更准确可靠。
AI.background: 超新星遗迹（SNR）的精确距离测量对于理解其物理特性和演化至关重要。
AI.data: 数据来源包括CO谱线观测和三维(3D)消光(extinction)地图，用于通过超新星遗迹(SNRs)相关的分子云确定距离。
AI.method: 结合CO谱线观测与三维(3D)消光(extinction)地图，通过分析超新星遗迹(SNR)与分子云的相互作用确定距离。
AI.result: 通过结合CO谱线观测与三维消光(3D extinction)地图的新方法，测定了四个超新星遗迹(SNR)的距离：G93.7$-$0.2为1.82$\pm$0.13 kpc，G109.1$-$1.0为3.05$\pm$0.15 kpc，G156.2+5.7为0.60$\pm$0.15 kpc，G166.0+4.3为3.44$\pm$0.23 kpc。

title: Diffuse and specular brightness models applied to LEO satellites. Case study: The ONEWEB constellation
comment: 14 pages, 9 figure in text and 4 figures in Appendix. Was accepted by A&A for publication in the section "13 Astronomical instrumentation"
summary: Context. To better understand the observed brightness of low Earth orbit satellites, we must characterize their reflectivity, which in turn depends importantly on their bus designs. The reflectivity of a body can be described by Lambert's law, in terms of its albedo, cross-sectional area, range (distance), phase angles, and the mixing coefficient between diffuse and specular reflection components. Aims. We aim to analyze the reflectivity of more than 300 ONEWEB satellites using the diffuse Lambertian sphere, diffuse and specular Lambertian sphere, and the relative reflectance brightness models. Methods. Astrometric and photometric measurements, plus two-line elements (TLE) orbital information were used to compute the apparent and range-magnitude, as well as the relevant angles related to the orientation of the Sun, the satellites, and the observer. A differential evolution Monte Carlo algorithm was used to obtain each model's parameters that best fit the data. Results. All models can fit the mean observed brightness of the satellites but cannot describe the observed phase-angle-dependent brightness modulations. The residuals in all cases have a standard deviation of $\sim$0.6 magnitudes, while the observational photometric errors are on average $\sim$0.2 magnitudes. Conclusions. The studied brightness models, which depend on the relative Sun-body-observer position but are independent of the specific orientation of the reflecting body surface(s) with respect to the observer, cannot entirely explain the observed brightness of the ONEWEB constellation satellites. Accounting for the real shape and the changing attitude of the satellite, as well as the effect of Earth's albedo is needed to better explain satellite photometric observations

AI.tldr: 通过分析300多颗ONEWEB卫星的反射特性，发现现有亮度模型（依赖太阳-卫星-观测者相对位置但忽略卫星表面具体朝向）无法完全解释其观测亮度，需结合卫星真实形状、姿态变化及地球反照率效应以改进模型。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于低地球轨道(LEO)卫星反射特性建模，特别是分析ONEWEB卫星群的亮度观测数据与多种反射模型(漫反射球体、混合反射模型等)的匹配程度。
AI.data: 使用了来自天体测量和测光观测的数据，以及双行轨道根数（TLE）信息来计算视星等、距离星等以及与太阳、卫星和观测者相关的角度。
AI.method: 采用漫反射朗伯球体（diffuse Lambertian sphere）、漫反射和镜面反射朗伯球体（diffuse and specular Lambertian sphere）以及相对反射亮度模型分析卫星反射特性，结合天体测量和光度测量数据及双行轨道根数（TLE），利用差分进化蒙特卡洛算法拟合模型参数。
AI.result: 所有研究的亮度模型（仅依赖太阳-物体-观测者相对位置而忽略反射体表面相对于观测者的具体朝向）均无法完全解释ONEWEB星座卫星的观测亮度。

title: Testing General Relativity on Galactic Scales via DESI-BAO and Strong Lensing: Circumventing Assumptions on the Hubble Constant, Sound Horizon, and Dark Energy
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, comments are welcome
summary: We present a cosmological model-independent framework for testing general relativity (GR) on galactic scales by combining baryon acoustic oscillation (BAO) angular scale measurements with 120 galaxy-scale strong gravitational lensing systems. Using artificial neural networks (ANNs) and cubic spline reconstruction, we reconstruct the BAO angular scale from SDSS, BOSS, eBOSS, and DESI Data Release 2 (DR2), and infer the angular diameter distances to lenses and sources. Crucially, All the quantities used in the GR test are derived from observations and are independent of cosmological parameters such as the Hubble constant, the sound horizon, or the dark energy equation of state, minimizing potential biases from model-dependent distance priors. These distances are then incorporated into the strong lensing likelihood to constrain the parameterized post-Newtonian (PPN) parameter $γ_{\rm PPN}$ under two lens mass models: a constant-density-slope model ($P_1$) and a redshift-evolving model ($P_2$). For the $P_1$ model, the ANN reconstruction yields $γ_{\rm PPN} = 1.102^{+0.148}_{-0.125}$, consistent with GR at $1σ$ confidence level, while the cubic spline gives $γ_{\rm PPN} = 1.150^{+0.139}_{-0.118}$, consistent with GR at $2σ$ confidence level. For the $P_2$ model, the ANN reconstruction gives $γ_{\rm PPN} = 1.315^{+0.181}_{-0.155}$, compatible with GR at $2σ$, while the spline gives $γ_{\rm PPN} = 1.485^{+0.193}_{-0.168}$, showing mild tension at $\sim2.5σ$. The constraints exhibit a clear dependence on the adopted lens mass model, underscoring the critical role of lens modeling. No significant correlation is observed between $γ_{\rm PPN}$ and the Einstein radius. Overall, current galaxy-scale observations are consistent with GR, providing no evidence for deviations from Einstein's theory on kiloparsec scales.

AI.tldr: 结合重子声波振荡(BAO)角度尺度和120个星系尺度强引力透镜系统，通过人工神经网络(ANN)和三次样条重建方法，在两种透镜质量模型下约束参数化后牛顿(PPN)参数γ_PPN，发现当前观测结果与广义相对论(GR)基本一致，但约束结果显著依赖于透镜质量模型选择。
AI.background: 该研究旨在通过结合重子声学振荡（BAO）角度尺度测量和120个星系尺度强引力透镜系统，建立一个不依赖宇宙学模型的框架，以在星系尺度上检验广义相对论（GR）的有效性。
AI.data: 数据来源于SDSS、BOSS、eBOSS和DESI Data Release 2（DR2）的重子声波振荡（BAO）角尺度测量以及120个星系尺度强引力透镜系统。
AI.method: 采用人工神经网络（ANNs）和三次样条重构技术重构重子声波振荡（BAO）角尺度，并结合强引力透镜系统推断透镜和源的角直径距离。
AI.result: 在恒定密度斜率模型（P1）下，人工神经网络重建得到的参数化后牛顿参数（γPPN）为1.102+0.148−0.125，与广义相对论在1σ置信水平一致；三次样条重建结果为1.150+0.139−0.118，在2σ水平一致。在红移演化模型（P2）下，人工神经网络重建结果为1.315+0.181−0.155（2σ一致），而样条重建结果为1.485+0.193−0.168（存在约2.5σ的轻微张力）。

title: Time-Domain Radio Loudness of Active Galactic Nuclei: Intermittency, Memory, and Jet Escape
comment: comments are welcome
summary: The classical radio-loudness parameter $R \equiv f_ν(5\,\mathrm{GHz})/f_ν(4400\,\textÅ)$ compares a prompt accretion tracer with a radio numerator that mixes rapidly varying compact-core emission, lobe plasma surviving over millions of years, and host-galaxy synchrotron emission. We introduce a time-domain radio-loudness (TDRL) framework that makes this timescale mismatch explicit. The radio numerator is decomposed into compact-core and extended-lobe contributions, each weighted by a recovered fraction that depends on observing frequency, angular resolution, and surface-brightness sensitivity. For a single intermittently jetted AGN population, a two-state jet duty cycle convolved with exponential lobe fading yields an exact stationary Beta distribution for the normalized extended-radio response, whose mean is $f_{\rm duty}$ and whose variance scales as $(1+χ_ν)^{-1}$ with $χ_ν\equiv\taunu/t_{\rm switch}$. This result serves as an analytic reference model, while precise inference will require population models matched to specific survey selections. In this minimal reference model, the familiar GHz valley near the classical radio-loud/quiet boundary can in principle arise from short radio memory alone, without invoking two intrinsic engine classes; metre-wave surveys that recover diffuse emission and model the host galaxy contribution should progressively fill that valley. In the $(R^{core}_ν,R^{lobe}_ν)$ plane a core--lobe mismatch index distinguishes triggering, sustained, and remnant jet phases. A complementary two-barrier phase diagram in event-horizon-threading magnetic flux and jet-escape parameter provides a heuristic organizing scheme for jet launching and propagation through the nuclear medium. The framework offers testable, frequency-dependent predictions for current and future radio surveys.

AI.tldr: 提出时域射电光度（TDRL）框架，通过分解射电核（compact-core）和延展瓣（extended-lobe）成分并引入喷流占空比（jet duty cycle）的贝塔分布模型，证明经典GHz波段射电宁静/噪分界低谷可由单一活动星系核（AGN）种群的短时标射电记忆效应产生，无需假设双引擎机制，同时提出核-瓣失配指数和双势垒相图用于区分喷流触发、持续和残余阶段。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于改进经典射电噪度参数（radio-loudness parameter）的时间尺度不匹配问题，提出时域射电噪度（TDRL）框架以区分致密核（compact-core）和延展瓣（extended-lobe）射电贡献，并建立与喷流活动周期（jet duty cycle）相关的解析参考模型。
AI.data: 数据来源包括射电波段5 GHz的致密核区（compact-core）辐射、延展瓣（extended-lobe）辐射以及宿主星系同步辐射的观测数据，通过不同角分辨率和表面亮度灵敏度进行分解加权。
AI.method: method：采用时间域射电响度（TDRL）框架分解射电成分，建立包含紧凑核（compact-core）和延展瓣（extended-lobe）权重的双态喷流（two-state jet）周期模型，并推导出归一化延展射电响应的精确稳态贝塔（Beta）分布。
AI.result: 提出了时域射电响度（TDRL）框架，通过分解射电成分（紧凑核与延展瓣）并引入恢复分数，建立了考虑观测参数影响的射电活动性量化模型。

title: Accurate and efficient simulation-based inference for massive black-hole binaries with LISA
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 1 table
summary: We develop an accurate simulation-based inference framework for high-mass ($\gtrsim\!10^7 \rm{M_\odot}$) black-hole binaries observable by LISA. The method is implemented within the DINGO gravitational-wave parameter-estimation code, extending its application from ground-based detectors to the LISA band. We train a normalizing-flow model using aligned-spin higher-mode waveform models and a low-frequency approximation of the detector response. After sampling, we importance-sample to the true posterior. We validate performance on simulated signals spanning the signal-to-noise regimes relevant for LISA observations and benchmark our new DINGO implementation against standard methods. We report robust agreement in the inferred posterior distributions up to signal-to-noise ratios of $\sim\!500$. At higher signal-to-noise ratios of $\sim\!1000$, we observe a reduction in sampling efficiency, while still yielding unbiased and tightly localized posteriors that can be used as a starting point for follow-up with traditional methods.The trained flow can generate 20 thousand posterior samples in less than a minute, establishing DINGO as a promising neural inference framework for rapid full-parameter estimation of massive black-hole binaries in the LISA band. The likelihood-free nature of this approach allows for straightforward generalizations, including a time-dependent detector response, non-stationary noise artifacts such as gaps and glitches, and low-latency parameter estimations.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于模拟的精确推理框架（DINGO），用于LISA可观测的高质量（≳10⁷ M☉）黑洞双星（black-hole binaries）参数估计，验证了在信噪比≤500时后验分布稳健一致，信噪比∼1000时仍能生成无偏且紧致的后验样本，支持快速全参数估计并兼容非平稳噪声等复杂场景。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于开发针对LISA可观测的高质量（$\gtrsim\!10^7 \rm{M_\odot}$）双黑洞（black-hole binaries）的精确模拟推断框架。
AI.data: 数据来源为使用对齐自旋高阶模波形模型（aligned-spin higher-mode waveform models）和探测器响应的低频近似（low-frequency approximation of the detector response）生成的模拟信号（simulated signals）。
AI.method: 采用基于模拟的推断框架（simulation-based inference framework），结合归一化流模型（normalizing-flow model）和对齐自旋高阶模波形模型（aligned-spin higher-mode waveform models）以及低频近似探测器响应（low-frequency approximation of the detector response），通过重要性采样（importance-sample）获得真实后验分布。
AI.result: 开发了一种基于模拟的精确推断框架，适用于LISA可观测的高质量（≳10⁷ M☉）双黑洞系统，扩展了DINGO引力波参数估计代码的应用范围至LISA频段。

title: Closed-form approximations of fundamental quantities of Lemaitre-Tolman-Bondi cosmologies from Symbolic Regression: I. Results on the Garcia-Bellido-Haugbølle parameterization
comment: 13 pages, 12 figures
summary: We introduce a novel set of analytic approximations for five fundamental functions in spherically symmetric, inhomogeneous Lemaitre-Tolman-Bondi (LTB) cosmologies, derived via Symbolic Regression (SR). Focusing on the constrained Garcia-Bellido-Haugboelle (GBH) parameterization, we sample the four-dimensional LTB parameter space using the bubble LTB numerical code and apply SR to reconstruct closed-form expressions for the radial and transverse scale factors A_parallel(r,t) and A_perp(r,t), the corresponding Hubble functions H_parallel(r,t) and H_perp(r,t), and the angular diameter distance D_A(z). Our best-fit formulas reproduce the numerical data with high precision: the relative mean error across all quantities remains below 0.3 percent, except for the radial Hubble function, where it reaches 1.4 percent. These compact expressions enable rapid evaluation of LTB predictions, supporting fast parameter scans, likelihood analyses, and model comparisons without time-consuming integrations. We provide explicit coefficients and discuss the domain of validity, demonstrating that SR-driven approximations can serve as robust surrogates for exact LTB solutions in both theoretical investigations and observational analyses.

AI.tldr: 通过符号回归（SR）为勒梅特-托尔曼-邦迪（LTB）宇宙学中的五个关键函数建立了高精度解析近似，实现了径向/横向尺度因子、哈勃函数及角直径距离的快速计算（平均误差<0.3%）。
AI.background: 研究主题为利用符号回归（Symbolic Regression, SR）方法在非均匀勒梅特-托尔曼-邦迪（Lemaitre-Tolman-Bondi, LTB）宇宙模型中构建径向与横向尺度因子、哈勃函数及角直径距离的解析近似表达式。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用bubble LTB数值代码对四维LTB参数空间进行采样生成的数值模拟数据。
AI.method: 采用符号回归（Symbolic Regression, SR）方法重建了勒梅特-托尔曼-邦迪（LTB）宇宙模型中五个基本函数的解析近似表达式。
AI.result: 通过符号回归（SR）方法，在受限的Garcia-Bellido-Haugboelle（GBH）参数化框架下，为径向和横向尺度因子A_parallel(r,t)、A_perp(r,t)、哈勃函数H_parallel(r,t)、H_perp(r,t)及角直径距离D_A(z)构建了高精度解析近似表达式，平均相对误差普遍低于0.3%（径向哈勃函数除外，达1.4%）。

title: No evidence of polarization in the $11.3\,μ$m PAH emission line by independent analyses
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication at ApJ
summary: Polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs) are commonly used as proxies for star formation, molecular gas content, and other interstellar medium (ISM) properties in our Galaxy and other galaxies. Given their abundance and brightness, polarization measurements of PAH features could, in principle, provide a probe of the ISM magnetic field and intrinsic PAH properties; however, the diagnostic power of PAH polarization remains to be established. Previous studies reported that the $11.3\,μ$m PAH emission line in the northwestern nebula of the Herbig Be star MWC 1080 was polarized at $1.9\pm0.2$%. This level of polarization was explained via the paramagnetic relaxation process, which may allow the characterization of magnetic fields in the ISM. Using the same observations, here, we re-analyzed the $8-13\,μ$m spectro-polarimetric observations taken with CanariCam on the 10.4-m Gran Telescopio CANARIAS (GTC), and we measure a polarization of $0.5\pm0.6$% within $11.3\pm0.2\,μ$m, consistent with an unpolarized source, $0.6\pm0.2$% (instrumental polarization). We reproduce the previously reported polarized PAH emission line if the polarization fraction spectrum is oversubtracted by a constant instrumental polarization and the polarization uncertainties, which is inconsistent with the fundamentals of polarimetric data analysis. Thus, the published $8-13\,μ$m spectro-polarimetric data taken with CanariCam/GTC provide no statistical evidence for a polarized $11.3\,μ$m PAH emission line, in agreement with current dust models.

AI.tldr: 通过重新分析赫比格Be星MWC 1080西北星云中11.3微米多环芳烃(PAH)发射线的偏振数据，发现其偏振度仅为0.5±0.6%，与未偏振源一致，否定了此前1.9±0.2%的偏振测量结果，表明该数据不支持PAH发射线偏振的存在。
AI.background: 多环芳烃（PAHs）作为恒星形成、分子气体含量及星际介质（ISM）其他性质的示踪剂被广泛应用于银河系及其他星系的研究。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用加那利大型望远镜(Gran Telescopio CANARIAS, GTC)上的CanariCam仪器获取的8-13μm光谱偏振观测数据。
AI.method: 采用CanariCam/GTC获取的8-13μm光谱偏振观测数据，重新分析了11.3±0.2μm波段内偏振度。
AI.result: 重新分析显示11.3微米多环芳烃(PAH)发射线的偏振度为0.5±0.6%，与未偏振源一致，不支持此前报告的1.9±0.2%偏振结果。

title: Modelling solar radial velocities and photometric variability with SOAPv4
summary: Stellar activity remains one of the main limitations in the detection of Earth-like planets using radial velocity (RV) measurements. The Sun, as the only star for which surface features can be spatially resolved, offers a unique testbed for studying the impact of active regions on RV and photometric variability. Using SOAPv4, we modelled solar RV and photometric variability induced by spots and faculae over long timescales. Our goal is to verify whether present-day, state-of-the-art models of the cross-correlation function correctly reproduce the observed variability. Moreover, we aim to assess how the choice of input data and identification technique influences the agreement between simulated and observed signals. To simulate solar RV and photometric time series, we first identified active regions in SDO images. This was done using mathematical morphological (MM) transforms applied to SDO/HMI and AIA images. MM identification was validated against other state-of-the-art identification methods. Using these inputs, we ran SOAPv4 to simulate solar RVs and photometry, and we validated the results with HARPS-N RV observations, as well as with VIRGO/SPM photometric measurements. The simulations that use MM identification achieved the best match with the observed RV time series, yielding residuals with a measured standard deviation of ~0.91 m/s. Other state-of-the-art methods produced higher filling factors and, consequently, larger discrepancies. The photometric simulations reproduced the overall variability trends. We demonstrate that MM transforms accurately identify solar active regions. Using these inputs, SOAPv4 reproduces the observed solar RV variability with a measured standard deviation of the residuals of ~0.91 m/s. Photometric simulations capture the overall variability trends, confirming that SOAP can reliably model the impact of both spots and faculae on solar RVs and photometry.

AI.tldr: 通过数学形态学（MM）变换精确识别太阳活动区（active regions），并基于SOAPv4模型模拟太阳径向速度（RV）和测光变化，将观测值与模拟值的残差标准差降至约0.91米/秒，验证了该模型在量化黑子（spots）和光斑（faculae）对太阳RV及测光影响方面的可靠性。
AI.background: 恒星活动性是限制利用视向速度（RV）测量探测类地行星的主要因素之一，而太阳作为唯一可解析表面特征的恒星为研究活动区对RV和光度变化的影响提供了独特测试平台。
AI.data: 数据来源于SDO（Solar Dynamics Observatory）的HMI（Helioseismic and Magnetic Imager）和AIA（Atmospheric Imaging Assembly）图像，以及HARPS-N（High Accuracy Radial velocity Planet Searcher-North）的径向速度（RV）观测数据和VIRGO/SPM（Variability of Solar Irradiance and Gravity Oscillations/Sun Photometers）的光度测量数据。
AI.method: 采用数学形态学变换（MM transforms）处理SDO/HMI和AIA图像识别活动区，并利用SOAPv4模型模拟太阳径向速度（RV）和测光变率。
AI.result: 数学形态学（MM）变换准确识别太阳活动区，基于此输入的SOAPv4模型重现了观测到的太阳径向速度（RV）变异性，残差标准差约为0.91 m/s。

title: Unimodular Diffusion and Interacting Vacuum Cosmology
comment: 20 pages, 4 figures
summary: We investigate the correspondence between unimodular diffusion cosmology and interacting dark sector models at the background and linear perturbation levels. In the diffusion framework, the effective cosmological constant becomes time dependent, $Λ(t)$, sourced by a diffusion current. We show that at background level this framework can be mapped onto interacting dark energy models with $w=-1$ and energy transfer $Q$. Using two common parameterizations, $Q = ξH ρ_{\rm de}$ and $Q = ξH ρ_{\rm dm}$, and data from supernovae, DESI BAO, cosmic chronometers, and CMB distance priors, we find $ξ= -0.0197 \pm 0.0076$ for the vacuum coupled case, while the matter coupled case gives a best fit $ξ= 0.0018$ with comparable fit. At linear perturbations, the diffusion framework is perturbatively equivalent only to interacting vacuum models with homogeneous energy transfer ($Q \propto ρ_{\rm de}$, $δQ=0$). Including redshift space distortion data, we obtain $ξ= -0.0147 \pm 0.0075$, consistent with $Λ$CDM ($ξ=0$) at $2σ$. The inferred clustering amplitude is $S_8 = 0.782 \pm 0.026$ for the diffusion model, compared to $S_8 = 0.77 \pm 0.025$ for $Λ$CDM under the same dataset, showing a modest impact on structure growth.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了单模扩散宇宙学(unimodular diffusion cosmology)与暗能量-暗物质相互作用模型在背景和线性扰动层面的等效性，发现扩散框架下时间依赖的宇宙常数Λ(t)在背景水平可映射到w=-1的相互作用暗能量模型，且线性扰动仅与能量转移均匀(Q∝ρ_de, δQ=0)的真空相互作用模型等效，观测约束显示ξ=-0.0147±0.0075与ΛCDM在2σ内一致，结构增长振幅S_8=0.782±0.026略高于ΛCDM的0.77±0.025。
AI.background: 研究探讨了单模扩散宇宙学(unimodular diffusion cosmology)与相互作用暗区模型(interacting dark sector models)在背景和线性扰动层面的对应关系。
AI.data: 数据来源包括超新星（supernovae）、DESI重子声波振荡（DESI BAO）、宇宙计时器（cosmic chronometers）和CMB距离先验（CMB distance priors）。
AI.method: 采用扩散框架（diffusion framework）将有效宇宙学常数（cosmological constant）建模为时间依赖的Λ(t)，并通过扩散电流（diffusion current）驱动其演化，同时在背景和线性扰动层面与暗能量（dark energy）和暗物质（dark matter）的相互作用模型建立映射关系。
AI.result: 在背景（background）层面，单模扩散宇宙学框架可映射到具有能量转移Q且状态方程参数w=-1的相互作用暗能量模型。

title: Q/W-band Observations toward Starless Cores in Orion (QWOSCO) I. Overview, Isotopologues, Isomers, and Complex Organics
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures, 1 figure set, 5 tables (including 2 machine-readable tables)
summary: Molecular inventories in starless cores are powerful tools for probing the physical and chemical structures at the earliest stages of star formation. Wide-band spectral scans are invaluable for obtaining a comprehensive view of the chemical composition. In this paper, we present the first results from the project Q/W-band Observations toward Starless Cores in Orion (QWOSCO), which uses the Yebes 40-m telescope to survey 23 starless cores in the Orion cloud at the Q (31.0--50.5 GHz) and W (71.1--91.4 GHz) bands with a total bandwidth of 40 GHz. We detect approximately 40 molecular species and derive their column densities, with each species exhibiting a characteristic spread of roughly one order of magnitude. The derived isomer and isotopologue column density ratios, including A/E, ortho/para, cyclic/linear, HNC/HCN, 12C/13C, 14N/15N, 16O/18O, 32S/34S, and D/H, are consistent with expectations for starless environments. Our results together with the literature suggest that the complex organic molecules (COMs) CH3OH and CH3CHO are both likely ubiquitous in starless cores. The column density ratio of CH3CHO with respect to CH3OH in starless cores are comparable or lower by a factor of around 25 than those in hot corinos at the protostellar stages if the CH3OH column density is directly derived or rescaled from that of 13CH3OH, respectively. Accordingly, we discuss the possible roles of methanol opacity and chemical mechanisms across the starless and protostellar stages.

AI.tldr: 首次在猎户座分子云23个无星核（starless cores）中通过Q/W波段宽频扫描检测约40种分子并测定其柱密度，发现复杂有机分子（COMs）CH3OH和CH3CHO普遍存在且其柱密度比在无星核与热核（hot corinos）阶段存在约25倍差异。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用分子清单探测恒星形成最早阶段（starless cores）的物理与化学结构。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用Yebes 40米望远镜对猎户座云中23个无星核（starless cores）在Q波段（31.0--50.5 GHz）和W波段（71.1--91.4 GHz）进行的总带宽40 GHz的宽频带光谱扫描观测。
AI.method: 采用Yebes 40米望远镜在Q波段(31.0--50.5 GHz)和W波段(71.1--91.4 GHz)对猎户座23个无星核进行宽频带(总带宽40 GHz)光谱扫描观测，检测约40种分子并计算其柱密度。
AI.result: 在猎户座云团23个无星核（starless cores）中检测到约40种分子并测得其柱密度，各物种柱密度呈现约一个数量级的特征性分布。

title: X-ray transients in the Chandra archive: Introducing the cumulative distribution discriminator (CuDiDi)
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: X-ray transients on sub-observation timescales represent a diverse and underexplored class of astrophysical phenomena, from stellar flares and magnetar bursts to extragalactic fast transients and supernova shock breakouts. We present a systematic search for such events across 20,212 Chandra ACIS observations using a new detection pipeline that combines source identification, light-curve analysis, catalogue cross-matching, and a novel statistical classifier, the cumulative distribution discriminator (CuDiDi). From 1420 initial candidates, we identified a high-confidence golden sample of 765 transients spanning a broad range of timescales, fluxes, and spectral shapes. The candidates are distributed across the whole sky and show a wide range of durations with a median of 10 ks. A subset of fast events lasting < 30 s displays very soft spectra and is likely due to flaring dwarf stars, although extragalactic phenomena cannot be ruled out for all of them. The comparison with previously published samples showed that CuDiDi identifies most known transients while imposing somewhat stricter variability criteria, and it also extends the total sample of Chandra transients to include shorter events. We deliver a comprehensive catalogue of sub-observation Chandra X-ray transients and establish a general method for exploiting archival datasets to uncover rare short-lived high-energy phenomena.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于累积分布判别器(CuDiDi)的新检测流程，在钱德拉(Chandra)X射线天文台数据中系统发现了765个高置信度亚观测时标瞬变源(transient)，扩展了短时标高能暂现源样本并建立了挖掘档案数据的通用方法。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于亚观测时标（sub-observation timescales）X射线暂现源的系统性探测与分类，填补了从恒星耀斑、磁星爆发到河外快速暂现源和超新星激波 breakout 等多样化高能暂现现象的研究空白。
AI.data: 数据来源于钱德拉X射线天文台（Chandra）的ACIS（Advanced CCD Imaging Spectrometer）仪器获取的20,212次观测数据。
AI.method: 采用新检测流程结合源识别、光变曲线分析、星表交叉匹配及新型统计分类器累积分布判别器（CuDiDi）。
AI.result: 通过新的检测流程（CuDiDi）在钱德拉（Chandra）数据中系统发现了765个高置信度瞬变源，涵盖广泛时标、流量和能谱形态，其中短于30秒的软能谱事件可能源于矮星耀发，并扩展了已知瞬变源样本至更短时标。

title: Inflationary Phase Transitions in the Early Universe: A Bayesian Study with Space-Based Gravitational Waves Detectors
comment: 2 figures, 3 tables
summary: Phase transitions during inflation can generate a stochastic gravitational-wave background that probes primordial physics. We study the detectability and parameter reconstruction of such a signal with a space-based gravitational-wave detector. Using a Taiji-like mission as a benchmark, we construct a realistic data-analysis framework that includes instrumental noise, astrophysical foregrounds and backgrounds, and the $A$, $E$, and $T$ time-delay interferometry channels. The target signal is described in a minimal, model-independent form and analyzed using both Fisher-matrix forecasts and Bayesian inference with nested sampling. We quantify detection significance and parameter-recovery thresholds, showing that while detection is achievable at moderate signal-to-noise ratios, stronger signals provide more reliable parameter reconstruction. These results offer a realistic assessment of the capability of future space-based missions to probe phase transitions during inflation through stochastic gravitational radiation.

AI.tldr: 研究了利用类似太极(Taiji)的空间引力波探测器探测宇宙暴胀时期相变产生的随机引力波背景，建立了包含仪器噪声、天体物理前景和数据通道的完整分析框架，发现中等信噪比可实现探测但强信号更利于参数重建。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用空间引力波探测器探测宇宙暴胀（inflation）期间相变（phase transitions）产生的随机引力波背景（stochastic gravitational-wave background），以探索早期宇宙物理。
AI.data: 数据来源于模拟的太极（Taiji）类空间引力波探测器任务，包括仪器噪声、天体物理前景和背景以及A、E、T时间延迟干涉测量通道。
AI.method: 采用费希尔矩阵(Fisher matrix)预测和嵌套采样贝叶斯推断(Bayesian inference with nested sampling)分析目标信号，构建了包含仪器噪声、天体物理前景和背景以及TDI（time-delay interferometry）通道的Taiji类任务数据分析框架。
AI.result: result：研究表明，基于太极（Taiji）类任务的引力波探测器能够探测到暴胀期间相变（phase transitions）产生的随机引力波背景（stochastic gravitational-wave background），并在中等信噪比下实现探测，但更强信号能提供更可靠的参数重建。

title: Revisiting the Excess of Bar-like Structures in TNG50 Early-type Galaxies: Consistency and Tension with Observations
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, a companion work to arXiv:2603.05287, accepted for publication in Research in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: The IllustrisTNG simulation suite, particularly TNG50, was reported to have generated a notable population of elongated, bar-like structures within galaxies classified as Early-Type Galaxies (ETGs). In this work, we revisit the nature of these structures at $z=0$ using a morphology-agnostic census. We find that these features are ubiquitous ($f_{\rm bar} \sim 75-80\%$) in dispersion-dominated galaxies ($D/T < 0.2$) in TNG50-1. They are not prolate rotators (rotating around their long axis), but genuine non-axisymmetric instabilities characterized by coherent, albeit slow, pattern speeds. Unlike the fast bars found in Late-Type Galaxies, these bar-like structures in ETGs are physically longer ($\gtrsim 3$ kpc), rotate significantly slower ($Ω_p \lesssim 20$ km s$^{-1}$ kpc$^{-1}$), and reside in red, gas-poor, dispersion-dominated systems. By tracing the evolutionary history of these systems, we demonstrate that such structures originate as typical fast bars in gas-richer discs at higher redshifts ($z \gtrsim 0.2$). They survive the galaxy quenching phase, undergoing secular deceleration and lengthening due to dynamical friction, ultimately appearing as slow, fossilized rotators in the $z=0$ red sequence. We conclude that the specific excess of bar-like structures in TNG50 ETGs likely reflects a combination of the imperfect baryonic physics of the simulation (over-producing these bar-like structures or their host ETGs) and a potential observational blind spot regarding long-lived, secularly evolved bars in hot stellar systems.

AI.tldr: TNG50模拟发现早期型星系(ETGs)中普遍存在(占比75-80%)物理长度较大(≥3千秒差距)、旋转速度较慢(Ω_p≲20 km/s/kpc)的棒状结构，这些结构起源于高红移(z≳0.2)气体丰富盘中的快速旋转棒，经历星系淬熄后通过动力学摩擦减速并伸长，最终成为红序星系中缓慢旋转的"化石"棒。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于早型星系（ETGs）中普遍存在的长条形棒状结构（bar-like structures）的动力学特性及其演化起源，探讨其与星系形态转变（quenching）和动力学摩擦（dynamical friction）过程的关联。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于IllustrisTNG模拟套件（特别是TNG50-1）生成的星系演化数据。
AI.method: 采用形态不可知（morphology-agnostic）的普查方法，结合演化历史追踪技术，重点分析了TNG50-1模拟中弥散主导星系（dispersion-dominated galaxies）的非轴对称不稳定性特征及其模式速度（pattern speed）。
AI.result: 在TNG50-1模拟中，75-80%的弥散主导星系（D/T < 0.2）普遍存在物理长度更长（≳3千秒差距）、旋转速度显著更慢（Ω_p ≲20 km s⁻¹ kpc⁻¹）的非轴对称不稳定棒状结构，这些结构起源于高红移（z≳0.2）气体更丰富盘中的典型快速棒，经历星系淬熄相后通过动力学摩擦发生长期减速和伸长，最终成为红序中缓慢的化石旋转体。

title: A plug-and-play approach with fast uncertainty quantification for weak lensing mass mapping
summary:
Upcoming stage-IV surveys such as Euclid and Rubin will deliver vast amounts of high-precision data, opening new opportunities to constrain cosmological models with unprecedented accuracy. A key step in this process is the reconstruction of the dark matter distribution from noisy weak lensing shear measurements.
  Current deep learning-based mass mapping methods achieve high reconstruction accuracy, but either require retraining a model for each new observed sky region (limiting practicality) or rely on slow MCMC sampling. Efficient exploitation of future survey data therefore calls for a new method that is accurate, flexible, and fast at inference. In addition, uncertainty quantification with coverage guarantees is essential for reliable cosmological parameter estimation.
  We introduce PnPMass, a plug-and-play approach for weak lensing mass mapping. The algorithm produces point estimates by alternating between a gradient descent step with a carefully chosen data fidelity term, and a denoising step implemented with a single deep learning model trained on simulated data corrupted by Gaussian white noise. We also propose a fast, sampling-free uncertainty quantification scheme based on moment networks, with calibrated error bars obtained through conformal prediction to ensure coverage guarantees. Finally, we benchmark PnPMass against both model-driven and data-driven mass mapping techniques.
  PnPMass achieves performance close to that of state-of-the-art deep-learning methods while offering fast inference (converging in just a few iterations) and requiring only a single training phase, independently of the noise covariance of the observations. It therefore combines flexibility, efficiency, and reconstruction accuracy, while delivering tighter error bars than existing approaches, making it well suited for upcoming weak lensing surveys.

AI.tldr: 提出PnPMass方法，通过交替梯度下降和去噪步骤实现弱引力透镜质量分布（weak lensing mass mapping）的高效重建，兼具单次训练、快速推理和校准误差估计优势，适用于未来大规模巡天数据。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用下一代宇宙巡天（stage-IV surveys）的高精度弱引力透镜（weak lensing）数据，通过暗物质分布重建提升宇宙学模型约束精度。
AI.data: 数据来源为模拟数据（simulated data）并添加了高斯白噪声（Gaussian white noise）进行训练。
AI.method: 采用交替梯度下降与深度学习去噪结合的插拔式方法（PnPMass），通过模拟数据训练单一模型实现快速推断，并结合矩网络和保形预测进行不确定性量化。
AI.result: PnPMass方法在保持接近最先进深度学习模型精度的同时，实现了快速推理（仅需数次迭代收敛）且仅需单次训练，不受观测噪声协方差影响。

title: ASKAP EMU detection of an Odd Radio Circle (ORC) candidate: J094412-751016 (Anglerfish)
summary: We report diffuse extended radio-continuum emission spatially coinciding with the IR source WISEA J094409.17-751012.8, and a semi-variable star, V687 Carinae. We use 944 MHz radio data from the large-scale Evolutionary Map of the Universe (EMU) survey to analyse this diffuse emission (EMU J094412-751016), which we nickname "Anglerfish". We investigate if the spatially correlated infrared (IR) source, WISEA J094409.17-751012.8, is physically related to Anglerfish. The IR colours of WISEA J094409.17-751012.8 are indicative of an elliptical galaxy, raising the possibility that Anglerfish may belong to the newly-discovered class of extragalactic radio sources known as Odd Radio Circles (ORCs) with WISEA J094409.17-751012.8 as the host galaxy. We also investigate the possibility that Anglerfish is physically related to the star, V687 Carinae, and whether it may be a remnant from a previous epoch of stellar mass-loss. We determine that a physical association between the radio emission and the star is unlikely due to the emission's non-thermal nature and the star's weak stellar winds compared to the theoretical expansion velocity of the 'shell'. It is possible that Anglerfish may be a Galactic high-latitude supernova remnant (SNR); however, we find that the observed size and luminosity are not consistent with this scenario. We also investigate the ORC scenario, which we deem the most likely scenario based on the Anglerfish's observed properties such as size, brightness, lack of other frequency detections, and spectral index. We therefore propose Anglerfish as an ORC candidate, but note that additional radio and optical observations are vital to further constrain the properties and confirm this classification.

AI.tldr: 发现与红外源WISEA J094409.17-751012.8空间重合的弥散射电连续辐射（EMU J094412-751016，昵称"Anglerfish"），其观测特征（如尺寸、亮度、频谱指数）最可能属于新发现的奇特射电圈（ORCs）类别，而该红外源可能是其宿主椭圆星系。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于探索与红外源WISEA J094409.17-751012.8和半变星V687 Carinae空间重合的弥散射电连续谱辐射（EMU J094412-751016，昵称"Anglerfish"）的物理本质，重点讨论其是否属于新发现的奇特射电圈（ORCs）类别或银河系高纬度超新星遗迹（SNR）。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自大尺度宇宙演化图（Evolutionary Map of the Universe, EMU）巡天的944 MHz射电数据来分析被昵称为“Anglerfish”的弥散射电连续谱辐射（EMU J094412-751016）。
AI.method: 采用944 MHz射电数据（来自EMU巡天）分析弥散射电连续谱辐射（EMU J094412-751016），结合红外颜色判定宿主星系类型，并通过非热辐射特性、恒星风强度与壳层理论膨胀速度对比排除恒星关联性，最终基于尺寸、亮度、频谱指数等观测特征提出其可能属于新发现的奇特射电圈（ORCs）候选体。
AI.result: 在射电波段发现的弥散扩展辐射源“Anglerfish”最可能属于新发现的奇特射电圈（ORCs）类别，其宿主星系可能是红外源WISEA J094409.17-751012.8。

title: The SPHEREx Ices Investigation: An Overview
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, Accepted to the Astrophysical Journal March 16, 2026
summary: SPHEREx is a NASA mission designed to perform an all-sky spectroscopic survey in the 0.75 - 5 $μ$m wavelength range. Its primary science objectives are to investigate: (1) inflationary cosmology, (2) the history of galaxy formation, and (3) the abundance of molecular ices - critical for prebiotic chemistry - found on the surfaces of interstellar dust grains within planet-forming regions. This paper focuses on the third theme, the SPHEREx Ices investigation, for which SPHEREx is conducting a spectroscopic survey of nearly ten million preselected sources throughout the Milky Way and Magellanic Clouds to characterize their ice absorption features. By selecting targets based on infrared color, spatial isolation, and brightness, the Ices Investigation secures high-signal-to-noise spectra across a broad range of astrophysical environments that are relatively free of spectral contamination. Rather than attempting to decompose each spectrum into its individual ice components, the Ices Investigation prioritizes accurate measurements of the integrated optical depths of key molecular ice absorption features. This approach enables statistically powerful correlation studies between ice abundances and environmental parameters - including extinction, temperature, gas composition, radiation field strength, cosmic ray flux, and star formation activity. The data pipeline developed for this purpose incorporates machine learning for continuum estimation, drawing on both SPHEREx and ancillary datasets. Ultimately, the expansive spectral archive produced by SPHEREx, combined with targeted follow-up from facilities like JWST, will transform our understanding of Galactic ice formation, evolution, abundance and their inheritance into planetary systems and prebiotic inventories.

AI.tldr: SPHEREx任务通过全天空光谱巡天测量银河系及麦哲伦云中约1000万个源的冰吸收特征，重点研究星际尘埃表面分子冰（molecular ices）丰度与环境参数的统计关联，为行星系统和生命前分子演化提供新认知。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用全天空光谱巡天（SPHEREx）探索星际尘埃颗粒表面分子冰（molecular ices）的丰度及其与行星形成区域预生命化学（prebiotic chemistry）的关联。
AI.data: 数据来源于SPHEREx任务对银河系和麦哲伦云中近千万个预选源进行的光谱巡天观测，结合辅助数据集用于连续谱估计。
AI.method: 采用基于红外颜色、空间隔离度和亮度的目标选择方法，结合机器学习进行连续谱估计的数据处理流程，优先测量关键分子冰吸收特征的积分光学深度（integrated optical depths）。
AI.result: SPHEREx任务通过全天空光谱巡天测量星际尘埃颗粒表面分子冰（molecular ices）的吸收特征光学深度（optical depths），建立冰丰度与环境参数的统计关联，揭示银河系冰的形成、演化及其向行星系统和生命前物质的传递机制。

title: Probing the Cosmic Web with Fast Radio Bursts. I. Scattering
comment: 20 pages + 4 pages in the appendix
summary: We study the formation of multiphase gas in the post-accretion-shock regions of cosmic sheets, filaments, and the circumgalactic medium (CGM) of haloes, i.e., cosmic web objects (CWOs). Local instabilities in the hot medium result in fragmentation and cooling, eventually forming small-scale overdensities with temperatures of $\sim 10^{4}{\,\rm K}$ in pressure equilibrium with the hot environment. Such dense, ionised inhomogeneities can affect the propagation of radio waves from fast radio bursts (FRBs), thereby offering us a way to probe their presence and properties in CWOs through scattering signatures in the observed FRB flux. We find that high-$z$ filaments \& sheets have a negligible contribution to the total observed scattering. The high rates of FRBs expected even at high redshifts may still allow detection from high-temperature filaments along rare sightlines, and we suggest other methods for such systems in a companion paper. Our model further predicts that if turbulent cloudlets exist in the CGM of intervening massive haloes with a volume-filling fraction of $f_{\rm v}\gtrsim 10^{-3}$, they are expected to cause considerable cumulative scattering along an average sightline, resulting in a significant correlation between the total scattering time and source redshifts. The lack of such a correlation in current observations may imply that the cool gas in the CGM has substantial non-thermal pressure, reducing its density, or significant damping of small-scale density fluctuations. Forthcoming localised FRB samples can map these constraints into bounds on volume-filling fractions, densities, cloud sizes, and the strength of turbulence.

AI.tldr: 研究发现宇宙网结构（cosmic web objects）中后激波区域的多相气体（multiphase gas）通过局部不稳定性形成小尺度致密电离团块（dense, ionised inhomogeneities），这些团块能通过快速射电暴（FRBs）散射特征探测，其中高红移（high-$z$）丝状结构（filaments）和片状结构（sheets）对散射贡献可忽略，而大质量晕（massive haloes）的环星系介质（CGM）中若存在湍流云团（turbulent cloudlets）且体积填充率（volume-filling fraction）$f_{\rm v}\gtrsim 10^{-3}$，则会导致显著的累积散射（cumulative scattering），但当前观测未发现散射时间与红移的相关性，暗示CGM冷气体（cool gas）可能存在非热压力（non-thermal pressure）或小尺度密度涨落（density fluctuations）阻尼。
AI.background: 研究宇宙网状结构（cosmic web objects, CWOs）中多相气体（multiphase gas）的形成机制及其对快速射电暴（FRBs）传播的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源于对宇宙网结构（cosmic web objects）中热介质局部不稳定性的模拟分析，重点关注了后激波区域多相气体形成过程及其对快速射电暴（FRBs）射电波传播的影响。
AI.method: 采用流体动力学不稳定性分析和多相介质冷却模型，结合快速射电暴（FRB）散射特征观测数据反演宇宙网状结构（CWOs）中的小尺度密度扰动。
AI.result: 高温丝状结构（filaments）和片状结构（sheets）对快速射电暴（FRBs）观测散射的贡献可忽略不计。

title: Tracing Star Formation in Quasar Hosts via [O II] $λ$3727: A Kinematically Consistent Approach
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, accepted by ApJL
summary: Measuring star formation in quasar host galaxies is crucial for understanding the coevolution of supermassive black holes (SMBHs) and galaxies, yet remains observationally challenging due to severe contamination from active galactic nucleus (AGN) emission. In this work, we present a new method to robustly isolate the AGN contribution to the [O II] $λ$3727 emission line in quasars, based on a kinematically consistent decomposition of [O II] and the high-ionization [Ne V] $λ$3426 line. We find that the [O II] emission in quasars is primarily dominated by star formation, with only a weak AGN contribution, and thus can be reliably used as a tracer of star formation in quasar hosts. Applying this technique to a large sample of Sloan Digital Sky Survey quasars, we derive mean SFRs as a function of bolometric luminosity. We find a tight correlation between mean SFR and luminosity. Further analysis, assuming a constant dust extinction correction to [O II] emission, shows that luminosity is the primary parameter most strongly associated with star formation, rather than SMBH mass or Eddington ratio. This supports the scheme in which star formation and black hole accretion are closely linked through their common dependence on the cold gas supply.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于[O II]和[Ne V]谱线运动学分解的新方法，发现类星体中[O II]发射主要来自恒星形成而非活动星系核(AGN)，并揭示恒星形成率(SFR)与光度存在紧密相关性，支持恒星形成与黑洞吸积共同依赖于冷气体供应的理论框架。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）与星系共演化过程中类星体宿主星系恒星形成的观测挑战及解析方法。
AI.data: 数据来源于斯隆数字巡天（Sloan Digital Sky Survey）的大样本类星体观测数据。
