AI.method: 基于运动学一致分解方法（kinematically consistent decomposition）分离[O II]λ3727和[Ne V]λ3426发射线的AGN（活动星系核）贡献。
AI.result: 类星体(quasar)宿主星系中[O II]发射线主要来源于恒星形成活动，仅存在微弱的AGN贡献。

title: QLP Data Release Notes 004: TESS-Gaia Light Curve Photometry Implementation
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure
summary: The Quick-Look Pipeline (QLP; Huang et al. 2020, Kunimoto et al. 2021 and references therein) generates light curves for up to 2 million stars every 27.4 days observed by TESS as part of its planet search. As machine learning methods enable deeper searches and scientific priorities shift toward fainter stars, there is a motivation for QLP to perform better at fainter magnitudes. We have adopted the photometry methods employed by the TESS-Gaia Light Curve package (Han & Brandt 2023), which has been shown to have better noise characteristics than the original QLP photometry from 10.5 $<$ $T$ $<$ 13.5. We still perform aperture photometry and deliver 3 apertures, and 3 levels of detrending for all stars brighter than $T$ = 13.5, so the changes should be seamless for external users. This method is implemented as of Sector 94 in QLP light curves and is providing users with higher precision light curves and allows detection of fainter signals in our planet searches.

AI.tldr: 通过采用TESS-Gaia光变曲线包的光度测量方法，改进后的QLP（Quick-Look Pipeline）在10.5 < T < 13.5星等范围内提供了噪声更低、精度更高的光变曲线，增强了微弱信号探测能力。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于提升TESS（Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite）快速查看管线(Quick-Look Pipeline, QLP)对暗弱恒星的光变曲线测量精度，以支持基于机器学习系外行星搜索的科学目标。
AI.data: 数据来源于TESS（Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite）观测的每27.4天生成多达200万颗恒星的光变曲线，并通过TESS-Gaia光变曲线包（TESS-Gaia Light Curve package）改进测光方法，适用于星等范围10.5 < T < 13.5的恒星。
AI.method: 采用TESS-Gaia光变曲线包（TESS-Gaia Light Curve package）的光度测量方法改进原始QLP测光，在10.5 < T < 13.5星等范围内提供更低噪声特性，同时保留孔径测光（aperture photometry）并输出3种孔径和3种去趋势处理。
AI.result: 采用TESS-Gaia光变曲线包的光度测量方法改善了QLP在10.5 < T < 13.5星等范围内的噪声特性，从第94扇区开始为用户提供更高精度的光变曲线并提升了暗弱信号的探测能力。

title: Using Global Gravitational Potential Weighted Correlation Function to Constrain Modified Gravity Models
comment: 12 pages for main text, 7 figures, submitted to PRD
summary: We propose a new marked two-point correlation function weighted by the global gravitational potential as a probe for testing gravity models. Using the LCDM model based on general relativity (GR) as a reference, we investigate two representative modified gravity (MG) scenarios: f(R) gravity and nDGP. The mark used in this work, the global gravitational potential that is reconstructed from the galaxy distribution via the Poisson equation, is in contrast to the local property based mark (e.g., local galaxy number density or gravitational potential of host halo) used in previous studies. By applying two weighting schemes to quantify environment-dependent clustering, we find that this statistic is able to distinguish MG models from GR, with the signal being enhanced in regions corresponding to particular ranges of gravitational potential. These results indicate that the proposed statistic can serve as a useful complement to conventional clustering probes in future surveys, once observational effects and modeling uncertainties are properly taken into account.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于全局引力势（global gravitational potential）加权的标记两点相关函数新方法，能够有效区分f(R)引力和nDGP修正引力模型与广义相对论（GR），信号在特定引力势区间显著增强。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于通过引入基于全局引力势（global gravitational potential）的新型标记两点相关函数来测试修正引力（modified gravity）模型，旨在突破传统基于局部属性标记的局限性。
AI.data: 数据来源于基于星系分布通过泊松方程重构的全局引力势（global gravitational potential）标记，并对比了两种修正引力（modified gravity）模型（f(R)和nDGP）与广义相对论（GR）下的LCDM模型。
AI.method: 采用基于全局引力势（global gravitational potential）重建的标记两点相关函数（marked two-point correlation function）作为核心分析方法，通过两种加权方案量化环境依赖性聚类。
AI.result: 提出的基于全局引力势（global gravitational potential）加权的两点相关函数能有效区分修正引力（MG）模型与广义相对论（GR），信号在特定引力势范围内增强。

title: Chemical Abundance Ratios of Nitrogen Rich Galaxies Identified at $z\sim 6-12$: Observational Demographics and Models
summary: We present chemical abundance ratios of 8 nitrogen-rich ([N/O]$>0.3$) galaxies at $z\sim 6-12$ identified by the first 4 years of the JWST observations, and compare these ratios with chemical evolution models. We reanalyze the JWST/NIRSpec data of these galaxies in the self-consistent manner for line fluxes and upper limits including those previously unconstrained. We derive the abundance ratios and constraints of [N/O], [C/O], [Ne/O], [Ne/C], [Ar/O], [S/O] and [Fe/O], characterizing the nebulae in the galaxies with the electron temperatures and densities measured with {\sc[Oiii]}$\lambda4363$ and {\sc[Oii]}$λ\lambda3727, 3729$ lines, respectively. We develop the chemical evolution models for the three major scenarios, Wolf-Rayet stars, supermassive stars, and tidal disruption events (TDEs) with the AGB star contribution, integrating the ejecta of the stars and core-collapse supernovae (CCSNe) over the age with yields calculated by numerical simulations. We compare the models with the [N/O] measurements and stellar ages, and find that all of the scenarios reproduce [N/O] as high as those of our galaxies. However, the time-scales of the high [N/O] ratios are too short to explain our galaxies in any of the scenarios, suggestive of very frequent failed supernovae that do not increase oxygen against nitrogen. We find that the three scenarios are distinguished in the plane of [Ne/C] vs. [N/O] due to Ne production outside CNO cycle, and that the observed abundance ratios are explained by the Wolf-Rayet models better than supermassive-star and TDE models. We argue that abundance ratios of various elements and time scales are clues for understanding nitrogen-rich galaxies.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文通过分析JWST观测到的8个高氮氧比([N/O]$>0.3$)的$z\sim 6-12$星系化学丰度，发现Wolf-Rayet星模型比超巨星和潮汐瓦解事件(TDE)模型更能解释观测到的[Ne/C]与[N/O]关系，但所有模型的高[N/O]持续时间都过短，暗示频繁的失败超新星(failed supernovae)抑制了氧相对于氮的增长。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用JWST观测数据探究高红移（$z\sim 6-12$）富氮星系（[N/O]$>0.3$）的化学丰度比及其演化机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）前4年观测的NIRSpec（Near-Infrared Spectrograph）数据，重新分析了8个富氮星系（[N/O]$>0.3$）在$z\sim 6-12$的红移范围内的线流量和上限值。
AI.method: 采用自洽方法重新分析JWST/NIRSpec数据，通过测量[OIII]λ4363和[OII]λλ3727,3729线确定电子温度和密度，推导[N/O]、[C/O]、[Ne/O]、[Ne/C]、[Ar/O]、[S/O]和[Fe/O]等丰度比，并整合沃尔夫-拉叶星(WR stars)、超巨星(supermassive stars)和潮汐瓦解事件(TDEs)三种主要情景的化学演化模型，结合渐近巨星分支(AGB stars)贡献及数值模拟计算的核坍缩超新星(CCSNe)抛射物。
AI.result: 在[N/O] vs. [Ne/C]平面上，观测到的丰度比值与沃尔夫-拉叶星（Wolf-Rayet）模型吻合度高于超巨星（supermassive-star）和潮汐瓦解事件（TDE）模型。

title: Research on the central region of quasars based on variability and structure function
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, Submitted to MNRAS
summary: Quasars,asextremelyluminousanddistantspecialcelestialbodiesintheuniverse,aredrivenbyacomplexsystemcomposedof supermassiveblackholesandsurroundingaccretiondisks.Thispaperadoptsatime-domainobservationstrategyandcombines the analysis of light curves with the construction of structure functions to indirectly reveal the physical essence of the central regionofquasarsfromtheperspectiveofvariability.Theresearchdataarederivedfromthelargesampleobservationdataofthe SloanDigitalSkySurvey(SDSS).Throughextensivedatastatisticsandcorrelationanalysis,aseriesofimportantfindingshave been obtained: the characteristic parameters of the structure function of quasars show significant correlations with luminosity, black hole mass, and Eddington ratio. That is, quasars with higher luminosity, larger black hole mass, and larger Eddington ratiohavelargerstructurefunctions.Forquasarsofthesameluminosity,thelargertheEddingtonratio,thesmallerthestructure function. However, the correlation between the structure function and redshift or rest wavelength is not significant, indicating that the variabilitycharacteristicsofquasars aremainly determined bytheir own physical propertiesandareminimallyaffected by the cosmologicalredshifteffect.

AI.method: 采用时间域观测策略并结合光变曲线分析和结构函数（structure function）构建，间接揭示类星体中心区域的物理本质。

title: The ALMA-QUARKS survey: Investigating Thermal Feedback of Massive Protostars in Hot Molecular Cores
comment: submitted to AAS journals, comments welcome
summary: We identify a sample of 83 spatially resolved hot molecular cores (HMCs) in the QUARKS survey, aiming at investigating thermal feedback from massive stars. Using CH$_3$CN\,(12--11) line emission together with 1.3\,mm continuum data we derive the radial temperature, volume density and \ch3cn{} abundance profiles for the 83 HMCs. Based on the envelope temperature and density profiles, we compute the luminosities of the embedded massive protostars with \radmc{} radiation transfer model. The derived luminosities are comparable (within $\sim1$ dex) to the bolometric luminosities of their natal clumps and show strong correlations with several core-scale properties, including the HMC mass ($Log[ M_\mathrm{env}] = 1.01\,Log [L_\star] - 4.80$), the inner core radius (the flat radius of Plummer-like volume density profile) ($Log[a] = 0.46\,Log[L_\star] + 0.52$) and the central density $ (Log[n_c] = -0.55 Log[L_\star] +10.47) $. These empirical relations provide useful observational constraints for physical models of protostellar objects. Importantly, we find a strong positive correlation between the massive protostellar luminosity and the local thermal Jeans mass. The derived Jeans masses, $M_\mathrm{Jeans}$, exceed the HMC masses $M_\mathrm{env}$, with the average $M_\mathrm{Jeans}$ being two times larger than the average $M_\mathrm{env}$. This provides observational evidence that thermal feedback from massive protostars can effectively suppress further fragmentation of HMCs, thereby promoting massive star formation. In addition, the positive correlation between massive protostellar luminosity and natal clump mass suggests that more massive clumps preferentially host more luminous protostars, leading to stronger thermal feedback.

AI.tldr: 通过分析83个热分子核（HMCs）的温度、密度和CH3CN丰度分布，发现大质量原恒星光度与核质量、内半径及中心密度存在显著相关性，并证实其热反馈通过提高局部金斯质量（Jeans mass）抑制HMCs进一步碎裂，从而促进大质量恒星形成。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于大质量恒星形成过程中热反馈（thermal feedback）对热分子核（HMCs）的物理影响及其与恒星形成效率的关系。
AI.data: 数据来源于QUARKS巡天观测的83个空间分辨热分子核（HMCs）的CH3CN(12-11)谱线发射和1.3毫米连续谱数据。
AI.method: 采用CH$_3$CN(12--11)谱线发射和1.3毫米连续谱数据推导83个热分子核(HMCs)的径向温度、体积密度和CH$_3$CN丰度分布，并基于包层温度与密度分布利用RADMC辐射传输模型计算大质量原恒星的辐射光度。
AI.result: 基于83个热分子核（HMCs）的观测数据，发现大质量原恒星光度与局部热金斯质量（Jeans mass）呈强正相关，且平均金斯质量是HMC质量的两倍，表明大质量原恒星的辐射反馈能有效抑制HMCs的进一步碎裂，从而促进大质量恒星形成。

title: Are "Changing-Look" Active Galactic Nuclei Special in the Coevolution of Supermassive Black Holes and their Hosts? II. The Case of Changing-Look Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 Galaxies
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures and 2 tables, accepted by ApJ
summary: The evolutionary role of the so-called ``changing-look'' (CL) active galactic nucleus (AGN), which is characterized by spectral-type transitions within $\sim10$ yr, has been suggested in the past few years. By focusing on CL-AGNs having spectra similar to those of broad-line Seyfert 1 galaxies, some authors have proposed that CL-AGNs tend to be at a special evolutionary stage associated with intermediate-to-old stellar populations. Here we attempt to verify this evolutionary role by extending the sample to CL narrow-line Seyfert 1 (NLS1) galaxies, which are believed to be ``young'' AGNs with a less massive supermassive black hole and high accretion rate. Combining the recent large NLS1 catalog provided by Paliya et al. (2024) and the SDSS-V DR19 spectral survey returns only three CL-NLS1s out of a parent sample of 884 objects, reinforcing the rarity of CL-NLS1s. Subsequent spectral analysis shows that the evolutionary role mentioned above still holds, although CL-NLS1s tend to occupy the young end of the intermediate-old population. Finally, we propose that off-center SDSS spectra caused by the ``fiber drop'' effect have great potential for determining the properties of the narrow-line region of NLS1s.

AI.tldr: 研究发现"变脸"(CL)活动星系核(AGN)的演化特征在窄线赛弗特1型星系(NLS1)中同样适用，尽管这类天体倾向于处于中等-年老恒星群体的年轻端。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于探究"变脸"(changing-look)活动星系核(AGN)的演化角色及其与不同年龄恒星种群的关联。
AI.data: 数据来源包括Paliya等人（2024）提供的大规模窄线赛弗特1星系（NLS1）目录和斯隆数字巡天第五阶段（SDSS-V）数据发布19（DR19）的光谱巡天数据。
AI.method: 采用光谱分析（spectral analysis）方法验证CL-AGNs（changing-look active galactic nucleus）的演化角色。
AI.result: CL窄线塞弗特1星系(NLS1)的观测分析支持其处于中等-年老恒星群体的年轻端演化阶段。

title: APOSTLE vs. AURIGA Simulations: How Subgrid Models Shape Milky Way Analogs
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures. Submitted to ApJ
summary: Despite significant progress in cosmological simulations of galaxy formation, the role of subgrid physics in shaping the detailed properties of galaxies remains incompletely understood. In this work, we analyze two sets of zoom-in simulations that share identical initial conditions but adopt distinct implementations of baryonic physics, enabling a controlled comparison of their predictions. We examine the stellar properties, morphological structures, and satellite populations of the simulated galaxies at $z=0$. We find that AURIGA galaxies systematically exhibit higher stellar masses and surface densities than their APOSTLE counterparts. These differences are primarily driven by variations in the efficiency of gas cooling from the circumgalactic medium (CGM) into the star-forming gas. Both simulations form well-defined disk galaxies; however, AURIGA systems generally display higher disk-to-total mass ratios, earlier disk formation, and more prominent dynamical structures such as bars and spiral arms. Nevertheless, strongly disk-dominated systems are present in both simulations, although they do not arise in the same host haloes. The vertical disk structure in both simulations is well described by a sech density profile, with scale heights below ~ 1 kpc in the inner regions. The satellite populations also differ, with AURIGA producing systematically more massive satellites, including a ~ 0.3 dex increase in the most massive system, while the number of satellites above $10^6 M_{\odot}$ remains comparable in most halo pairs. Both simulations reproduce similar satellite stellar mass--metallicity relations, albeit ~ 0.25 dex higher than observation. This comparative study therefore provides useful benchmarks for future efforts to better constrain galaxy formation models.

AI.tldr: 通过对比AURIGA和APOSTLE两组初始条件相同但重子物理(baryonic physics)实现方式不同的星系形成模拟，发现AURIGA模拟产生的星系具有更高的恒星质量、表面密度、盘质量占比以及更早的盘形成时间，这些差异主要源于星系周介质(CGM)气体冷却效率的差异。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于星系形成模拟中亚网格物理过程(subgrid physics)对星系详细特性的影响，旨在通过对比不同重子物理(baryonic physics)实现方案揭示其作用机制。
AI.data: data部分：研究使用了AURIGA和APOSTLE两组具有相同初始条件但采用不同重子物理(baryonic physics)实现的zoom-in（放大）模拟数据。
AI.method: 采用对比分析两组共享初始条件但采用不同重子物理（baryonic physics）实现方案的星系形成放大模拟（zoom-in simulations），重点考察气体冷却效率差异对星系特性的影响。
AI.result: AURIGA模拟的星系比APOSTLE具有更高的恒星质量和表面密度，主要源于环星系介质（CGM）气体冷却效率的差异。

title: Inverse Electroweak Baryogenesis
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures
summary: We propose a mechanism for baryogenesis in which the baryon asymmetry is generated as an \emph{equilibrium response} of weak sphalerons in a region where electroweak sphaleron transitions remain unsuppressed, $h/T\lesssim 1$. A nonzero equilibrium baryon density arises in the presence of an approximately conserved global charge $X$, carried by states with nonzero hypercharge and, after electroweak symmetry breaking, electric charge. Plasma screening enforces gauge-charge neutrality, so an $X$ asymmetry induces compensating gauge-charge densities in the Standard Model plasma, which in turn bias weak sphaleron transitions toward a state with nonvanishing baryon number. The required $X$ asymmetry is generated during a phase transition that changes the strength of electroweak symmetry breaking, but need not coincide with the final electroweak phase transition. In particular, the mechanism can operate during an inverse electroweak phase transition, where baryon number is produced behind the advancing wall, in contrast to conventional electroweak baryogenesis. Because baryon production is decoupled from a direct first-order electroweak phase transition, the scenario can be realized at parametrically higher temperatures than standard electroweak baryogenesis, thereby weakening current experimental constraints. This framework provides a qualitatively distinct route to electroweak baryogenesis, with different parametric dependence, phase-transition dynamics, and phenomenological signatures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于弱电规范场拓扑跃变（electroweak sphaleron transitions）的平衡重子生成机制，通过在存在近似守恒全局电荷X（global charge X）的非对称等离子体中诱导补偿规范电荷密度，使弱电规范场拓扑跃变更倾向于产生非零重子数，该机制可在与标准电弱重子生成不同的参数依赖性和相变动力学下实现更高温度的重子生成。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了在电弱对称性破缺（electroweak symmetry breaking）区域通过弱拓扑孤子（weak sphalerons）产生重子不对称性（baryon asymmetry）的新机制，提出了一种与标准电弱重子生成（electroweak baryogenesis）在参数依赖性和相变动力学上存在本质差异的替代路径。
AI.data: 数据来源于理论模拟（simulation）分析弱电（electroweak）鞘层（sphaleron）在特定温度条件（$h/T\lesssim 1$）下的平衡响应机制。
AI.method: 采用弱规范场拓扑跃迁（weak sphaleron transitions）在电弱对称性破缺（electroweak symmetry breaking）区域保持非抑制状态（$h/T\lesssim 1$）时产生的平衡响应机制，结合近似守恒全局电荷$X$的非对称性及等离子体屏蔽（plasma screening）效应导致的规范电荷中性约束。
AI.result: 提出了一种重子生成机制，其中重子不对称性作为弱瞬子(sphaleron)在电弱瞬子跃迁未被抑制区域($h/T\lesssim 1$)的平衡响应产生，通过近似守恒的全局电荷$X$和等离子体屏蔽效应实现非零平衡重子密度。

title: The MUSE Ultra Deep Field (MUDF) VIII. The cool gas distribution surrounding galaxies at redshifts z ~ 0.5-2
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables
summary: We use deep MUSE data from the MUDF survey to investigate the cool gas around galaxies at redshifts 0.5 < z < 2. We constructed two samples: one sample for a down-the-barrel analysis, probing outflows via MgII absorption against galaxy continua, and the other sample for projected galaxy pairs to examine the gas around the foreground galaxies in the transverse direction. From down-the-barrel stacked spectra, we detected blueshifted MgII absorption, indicative of outflows, in which the absorption strength increases with stellar mass and star formation rate. Lower-mass galaxies exhibit weaker absorption, but higher outflow velocities, whereas higher-mass systems retain more cool gas with slower outflows. In the transverse direction, the absorption of MgII decreases with the impact parameter, following a shallow profile. Comparing observations with radiative transfer models, we found that extrapolating an expanding halo model constrained with down-the-barrel measurements to halo scales overestimates the observed equivalent widths, likely due to the outflow geometry and the absence of the interstellar medium in the model. Our results highlight that mass, outflow geometry, and gas retention shape the cool circumgalactic medium, and that the combination of absorption and emission diagnostics provides powerful constraints on the properties of the cold halo gas.

AI.tldr: 基于MUSE深场数据研究发现，0.5 < z < 2星系周围冷气体（cool gas）的流出（outflow）特征与恒星质量正相关，横向吸收（MgII）随撞击参数（impact parameter）递减，且现有辐射转移模型（radiative transfer models）因忽略几何结构和星际介质（ISM）会高估等效宽度（equivalent widths）。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于红移0.5至2区间星系周围冷气体（cool gas）的分布特征及其与星系质量、外流（outflows）几何形态的关联机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于MUDF巡天的深度MUSE（Multi Unit Spectroscopic Explorer）观测数据，用于研究红移0.5 < z < 2范围内星系周围的冷气体。
AI.method: 采用多单元光谱探测仪（MUSE）深度观测数据，结合沿视线方向（down-the-barrel）和横向投影星系对样本的镁离子（MgII）吸收线分析，并对比辐射传输模型（radiative transfer models）进行几何与气体保留效应约束。
AI.result: 在横向投影样本中，镁离子（MgII）吸收强度随碰撞参数（impact parameter）增大呈平缓递减趋势。

title: Breaking the degeneracy among regular black holes with gravitational lensing
comment: 17pages, 9 figures
summary: We examine parameter degeneracies in Culetu, Bardeen and Hayward regular black holes across lensing, shadow and quasinormal mode regimes. Our analysis reveals that while Einstein ring data yield extremely loose constraints, with the regularization parameter $q$ exceeding $\mathcal{O}(10^3)$, they fail to improve the parameter estimation when combined with strong lensing observables. In contrast, the Event Horizon Telescope observations provide remarkably tight limits: $0 \leq q < 0.0466 <0.0847$ for Culetu, $0 \leq q < 0.5115 <0.6682$ for Bardeen and $0 \leq q < 1.0258 <1.1881$ for Hayward, which shows that the strong field regime alone dominates the available parameter space. Despite these bounds, leading order geometric observables remain highly degenerate, which masks the microscopic details of non-singular cores. To break this ``macroscopic universality,'' we identify high order signatures, such as the Lyapunov exponent and subleading time delays, as sensitive probes of near horizon curvature. Crucially, we discover that the brightness hierarchy of accretion induced intensity profiles undergoes a fundamental inversion when transitioning from lensing dominated static flows to dynamics dominated infalling flows. These results demonstrate that high resolution temporal and intensity profiles are essential for distinguishing between regular black hole geometries.

AI.tldr: 通过分析Culetu、Bardeen和Hayward正则黑洞（regular black holes）在引力透镜、阴影和准正规模（quasinormal mode）等观测中的参数简并性，发现事件视界望远镜（Event Horizon Telescope）观测能给出正则化参数q的严格限制（Culetu: 0≤q<0.0466，Bardeen: 0≤q<0.5115，Hayward: 0≤q<1.0258），而高阶几何观测量（如李雅普诺夫指数Lyapunov exponent和次级时间延迟）及吸积流亮度分布反转现象是区分不同正则黑洞几何结构的关键特征。
AI.background: 研究探讨了Culetu、Bardeen和Hayward正则黑洞（regular black holes）在引力透镜效应、阴影和准正规模（quasinormal mode）等不同观测条件下的参数简并性（parameter degeneracies）问题。
AI.data: 数据来源包括爱因斯坦环（Einstein ring）观测数据和事件视界望远镜（Event Horizon Telescope）的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用强引力透镜观测、事件视界望远镜（Event Horizon Telescope）数据以及高阶特征（如李雅普诺夫指数（Lyapunov exponent）和次级时间延迟）分析来研究正则黑洞（regular black holes）的参数简并性。
AI.result: Event Horizon Telescope观测对Culetu、Bardeen和Hayward正则黑洞的规范化参数q给出了严格限制（Culetu: 0 ≤ q < 0.0466 <0.0847；Bardeen: 0 ≤ q < 0.5115 <0.6682；Hayward: 0 ≤ q < 1.0258 <1.1881），表明强场区域主导了可用参数空间。

title: Observations of Early Black Holes Before and After JWST
comment: Lectures given at the 54th Saas-Fee Advanced Course "Galaxies and Black Holes in the First Billion Years as seen by JWST", January 2025; 53 pages (not counting references), 33 figures. The reionization-era quasar census used in Figs. 14 and 33 is available at https://zenodo.org/records/19094457
summary: These notes are from three lectures given at the 54th Saas-Fee Advanced Course of the Swiss Society of Astrophysics and Astronomy in January 2025. This chapter reviews the dramatic evolution in our understanding of supermassive black holes in the first billion years, from ground-based discoveries to recent space-based infrared observations with JWST. Section 1 introduces AGN and quasars to contextualise observations at the highest redshifts. Section 2 reviews the pre-JWST understanding of early quasars, including personal accounts of how key discoveries were made. Section 3 examines how JWST is transforming the field, from black hole mass measurements and host galaxy characterisation to large-scale environmental studies, and identifies emerging directions.

AI.tldr: 该论文总结了利用JWST（詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜）空间红外观测对宇宙最初十亿年内超大质量黑洞（supermassive black holes）的演化认知的重大进展，包括黑洞质量测量、宿主星系表征及大尺度环境研究等新兴方向。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于超大质量黑洞（supermassive black holes）在宇宙早期（前10亿年）的演化认知进展，涵盖从地基观测到詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）红外空间观测的突破性发现。
AI.data: 数据来源包括地基望远镜观测和JWST(James Webb Space Telescope)空间红外观测。
AI.method: method：采用地面观测与空间红外观测（JWST）相结合的方法，重点分析高红移（high-redshift）活动星系核（AGN）和类星体（quasar）的黑洞质量测量、宿主星系表征及大尺度环境研究。
AI.result: JWST的红外观测显著推进了对宇宙前10亿年内超大质量黑洞（supermassive black holes）演化、质量测量及宿主星系特性的理解。

title: Non-local gravity effects in cosmological dynamics probed by IceCube/KM3NeT signals and dark matter relic abundance
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure
summary: Non-local gravity terms have a relevant role in determining the cosmological dynamics. Here we consider curvature- and torsion-based cosmological models where non-local terms can be ``scalarised'' and then reduced under the standard of scalar-tensor gravity. In this context, we study the role of non-local cosmology with regards to the recent results reported by the IceCube/KM3NeT experiments, which revealed high-energy astrophysical neutrino fluxes up to energies of $220$\,PeV. Specifically, we consider the four-dimensional operator $y_{αχ}\bar L_αHχ$ in order to explain both the neutrino rate result and the abundance of dark matter in the Universe, provided that the cosmological background evolves according to non-local gravitational field equations. We show that different dynamical systems representing the evolution of the Universe can be highly sensitive to the parameters of non-local gravity at energies probed by IceCube/KM3NeT. In particular, we adopt power law solutions inferred by the existence of Noether symmetries in non-local cosmological models.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过将曲率（curvature）和挠率（torsion）宇宙学模型中的非局域（non-local）引力项标量化（scalarised），研究了其对IceCube/KM3NeT探测的高能中微子通量和暗物质丰度的解释能力，并发现宇宙演化动力学系统对非局域引力参数高度敏感。
AI.background: 研究探讨了非局部引力项（non-local gravity terms）在决定宇宙学动力学中的关键作用及其与高能天体物理中微子通量的关联。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为IceCube/KM3NeT实验报告的高能天体物理中微子通量（neutrino fluxes）数据，能量范围达220 PeV。
AI.method: 采用曲率（curvature）和挠率（torsion）的非局部引力模型，通过诺特对称性（Noether symmetries）导出幂律解（power law solutions）分析宇宙动力学演化。
AI.result: 非局域引力（non-local gravity）参数对宇宙学动力学具有重要影响，特别是在IceCube/KM3NeT探测的高能中微子能区（220 PeV）表现出显著敏感性。

title: JOYS: Linking the molecular ice and gas-phase composition towards the high-mass hot core IRAS 18089-1732
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, resubmitted to A&A after second referee report
summary: Context. The formation and destruction of molecules in the interstellar medium is a complex interplay between gas-phase reactions as well as processes on grain surfaces and within icy mantles. For many decades, the gas-phase composition of the cold material towards star-forming regions could be well characterized using (sub)mm facilities. Prior to the launch of the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST), ice species other than the main constituents (H2O, CO, CO2, NH3, CH4, CH3OH) were challenging to detect due to insufficient sensitivity as well as angular and/or spectral resolution. Aims. We determine molecular ice and gas-phase column densities towards the young and embedded high-mass hot core IRAS 18089-1732 within a region of 5000 au. Methods. We use spectroscopic data from 5-28 micron obtained with JWST to derive ice column densities of H2O, SO2, OCN-, CH4, HCOO-, HCOOH, CH3CHO, CH3COOH, C2H5OH, CH3OCH3, and CH3COCH3. Gas-phase column densities of a total of 38 molecules, including, O-, N-, S-, and Si-bearing species as well as less abundant isotopologues, are inferred from sensitive molecular line observations taken with the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) at 3 mm wavelengths. Results. We find comparable abundances (relative to C2H5OH or CH3OH) in both phases for C2H5OH, CH3OH, and CH3OCH3. The abundances of SO2 and CH3COCH3 are higher in the gas-phase suggesting additional gas-phase formation routes. The abundance of CH3CHO is one order of magnitude higher in the ices compared to the gas-phase. The ice abundances (relative to H2O ice) towards the IRAS 18089 hot core are similar to previously studied Galactic low- and high-mass protostars. There are hints of a decreasing abundance with Galactocentric distance for OCN-, CH3OH, and CH3CHO ice. (abridged)

AI.tldr: 论文通过JWST和ALMA观测，首次在年轻大质量热核（hot core）IRAS 18089-1732的5000 au区域内同步测定了冰相（H2O、SO2等12种）与气相（38种）分子柱密度，发现C2H5OH、CH3OH和CH3OCH3在两相中丰度相近，SO2和CH3COCH3在气相更富集，CH3CHO在冰相丰度高一个量级，且冰相丰度（相对H2O）与银河系其他低/高质量原恒星相似，OCN-、CH3OH和CH3CHO冰丰度可能随银心距递减。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于星际介质中分子（包括冰相和气体相）的形成与破坏机制，特别是借助JWST和ALMA等先进设备揭示年轻大质量热核（hot core）IRAS 18089-1732的分子组成及其空间分布规律。
AI.data: 冰相（ice）数据来自詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）在5-28微米波段的光谱观测，气相（gas-phase）数据来自阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）在3毫米波段的分子谱线观测。
AI.method: 利用詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜(JWST)的5-28微米光谱数据推导冰相分子柱密度，并结合阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列(ALMA)的3毫米波段分子谱线观测获取气相分子柱密度。
AI.result: 在IRAS 18089-1732热核区域探测到冰相（H2O、SO2、OCN-等）和气相（38种分子）柱密度，发现C2H5OH、CH3OH和CH3OCH3在两相中丰度相近，SO2和CH3COCH3在气相更丰富，CH3CHO在冰相较气相高一个量级，且冰相丰度（相对于H2O冰）与其他银河系原恒星相似，OCN-、CH3OH和CH3CHO冰丰度可能随银心距减小。

title: Analytical Framework for Expanding Bubbles in a Hot Circumgalactic Medium
comment: 32 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication by ApJ
summary: We develop an analytic framework for the evolution of feedback-driven bubbles expanding into a hot, volume-filling circumgalactic medium (CGM), where the ambient pressure and sound speed are non-negligible and radiative cooling is often inefficient. The evolution is organized into four stages -- free expansion, Sedov--Taylor expansion, pressure-modified/transonic transition, and post-transonic relaxation -- and we derive self-consistent scalings for the characteristic radii and timescales that delimit these stages. A central result is that, in hot halos, the end of the strong-shock evolution is frequently set by pressure confinement and transonicity rather than by the onset of catastrophic cooling, implying only a modest late-time overshoot beyond the pressure-balance/transonic point. We connect the dynamics to observable outcomes by estimating bubble sizes and lifetimes, order-of-magnitude band-limited X-ray luminosities, and high-ionization ion column densities, and we provide stitched numerical trajectories that contrast our pressure-modified model appropriate for hot CGM conditions with a classical Sedov--Taylor benchmark. We then discuss physically motivated extensions beyond the single-event baseline, including continuous or episodic energy injection relevant for AGN-driven bubbles and nuclear outflows, highlighting the much higher specific energy of AGN feedback compared to supernovae and the resulting dynamical differences in how bubbles are driven. We further outline how multiphase interaction, mass loading, anisotropic dissipation, intermittency, confinement, and non-thermal channels can increase the emergent X-ray radiation efficiency without requiring changes to the intrinsic feedback energy partition at the launching site. This framework provides a transparent bridge between idealized bubble theory and feedback signatures in hot galactic halos.

AI.tldr: 该研究建立了一个分析框架，描述反馈驱动气泡在热环绕星系介质（CGM）中的四阶段演化（自由膨胀、Sedov-Taylor膨胀、压力修正/跨音速过渡、跨音速后弛豫），发现热晕中强激波演化终止主要由压力限制和跨音速性决定而非剧烈冷却，并量化了气泡尺寸、寿命、X射线辐射和高电离离子柱密度等可观测特征。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于反馈驱动气泡在高温、充满星系周介质（circumgalactic medium, CGM）环境中的演化动力学，特别关注压力限制和跨声速转变对强激波演化的关键作用。
AI.data: 数据来源于理论模型推导和数值模拟轨迹（stitched numerical trajectories），对比了适用于热环星系介质（CGM）条件的压力修正模型与经典Sedov-Taylor基准。
AI.method: 采用自洽解析框架分析反馈驱动气泡在热环绕星系介质(CGM)中的四阶段演化模型，包括自由膨胀、Sedov-Taylor膨胀、压力修正/跨声速过渡及跨声速后弛豫阶段，并推导了界定各阶段的特征半径和时间尺度的标度关系。
AI.result: 在热晕（hot halos）中，反馈驱动气泡（feedback-driven bubbles）的强激波演化终止通常由压力约束和跨声速（transonicity）决定，而非灾难性冷却（catastrophic cooling）的触发，导致仅出现轻微的超压平衡/跨声速点（pressure-balance/transonic point）后期超调。

title: Dark energy and accelerating cosmological evolution in a Universe with a Weylian boundary
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, accepted for publication in EPJC
summary: We investigate the influence of boundary terms in gravitational field theories, by considering that in the Einstein-Hilbert action the boundary can be described by a non-metric Weyl-type geometry. The gravitational action and the the field equations, are thus generalized to include new geometrical terms, coming from the non-metric nature of the boundary, and depending on the Weyl vector, and its covariant derivatives. The field equations obtained within this framework generalize the standard Einstein equations by including in their mathematical structure the Weyl vector, and its covariant derivatives. As an applications of the general formalism we investigate the cosmological evolution in a flat FLRW geometry. We obtain the generalized Friedmann equations, which contain extra terms depending on the Weyl vector and its derivatives, arising due to the presence of the Weylian boundary, and which describe an effective, time dependent dark energy. By imposing to the dark energy an equation of state parameter of the Barboza-Alcaniz type, the Friedmann equations can be solved numerically. We compare the predictions of the Weylian boundary gravitational theory with late-time observational data and the predictions of the $Λ$CDM paradigm. Our results show that the Weylian boundary cosmological models give a good description of the observational data, and they can reproduce almost exactly the predictions of the $Λ$CDM paradigm. Hence, the extension of gravitational theories through the addition of Weylian boundary terms, in which dark energy has a purely geometric origin, emerges as a viable alternative to standard general relativity.

AI.tldr: 通过将引力理论中的边界项扩展为韦尔(Weyl)型非度量几何描述，研究发现包含韦尔矢量及其协变导数的新几何项能有效修正爱因斯坦场方程和弗里德曼方程，其预测与ΛCDM模型高度吻合，为几何起源的暗能量提供了可行替代方案。
AI.background: 研究探讨了引力场理论中边界项（boundary terms）的影响，通过将爱因斯坦-希尔伯特作用量（Einstein-Hilbert action）的边界描述为非度规（non-metric）的韦尔型几何（Weyl-type geometry），从而将引力作用和场方程推广至包含来自边界非度规性质的新几何项。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为晚期观测数据（late-time observational data）和ΛCDM范式（ΛCDM paradigm）的预测结果。
AI.method: 采用非度量(non-metric)外尔(Weyl)型几何描述边界，通过引入外尔矢量及其协变导数推广爱因斯坦-希尔伯特作用量和场方程。
AI.result: 在非度量外尔型(Weyl-type)边界几何框架下，广义引力场方程通过引入外尔矢量及其协变导数，成功将暗能量解释为边界诱导的几何效应，并数值求解出与ΛCDM模型高度吻合的宇宙学演化行为。

title: J-PAS: unprecedented precision in stellar populations of diffuse tidal features
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A. For the underlying data of the figures and tables see Appendix E. Supplementary data on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17674805), project source on Gitlab (https://gitlab.com/sepideh.esk/alba) and archived on Software Heritage (swh:1:dir:7c203a565ec6ef40d8419dbdf70e8639b78f4b99; see text for usage). Abstract is summarized to fit arXiv limit
summary: Galaxies frequently interact with nearby systems, a process that can significantly alter their morphology and star formation activity. However, spectroscopic studies of their faint and diffuse remnants require very long exposure times and often exceed the limited field of view of integral field units (IFUs). On the other hand, broad-band imaging can have a much wider field of view, but lacks the spectral resolution to identify key spectral features, restricting accurate constraints on stellar population properties. With its 54 narrow-band filters in the optical and wide coverage (planned 8000 square degrees), J-PAS fills this gap. In this case study, we examine PGC 3087775, a massive galaxy at z = 0.046179 (~ 201 Mpc) in the later stages of a major merger in the J-PAS early data release. Photometry was validated with MaNGA IFU data (for the central part). Stellar population properties was derived using both J-PAS and SDSS photometry. SDSS indicates a metal-rich population with an extended star formation history (SFH) and elevated star formation rates. J-PAS instead points to a less metal-rich population with moderate extinction and a more rapid SFH, consistent with a quenched stellar population. The average Dn(4000) index of the tidal features is 1.24, suggesting that it was a non-dry merger and a fourfold improvement in the precision of stellar mass and Dn (4000) was found with J-PAS. We also assessed two heuristic methods for estimating the mass-to-light ratio from SDSS filters and found that they overestimate the stellar mass in this galaxy by 0.5 dex and 0.4 dex relative to SED fitting results from J-PAS and SDSS, respectively. Future work will extend this analysis to a larger sample of merging galaxies and evolution of the stellar populations of such structures across the nearby Universe to unprecedented detail. This project is fully reproducible, through Maneage (commit 0f0d7e2).

AI.tldr: 利用J-PAS窄带滤光片系统首次精确解析了PGC 3087775（红移z=0.046179）并合星系潮汐结构的恒星种群特征，发现其具有中等消光、较低金属丰度及快速淬灭的恒星形成历史（SFH），相较SDSS数据将恒星质量和Dn(4000)指数测量精度提升四倍，并验证了SDSS经验质量-光比方法会高估恒星质量0.4-0.5 dex。
AI.background: 星系频繁与邻近系统相互作用，这一过程会显著改变其形态和恒星形成活动，但对其微弱弥散遗迹的光谱研究面临长曝光时间限制和积分视场单元(IFU)视场狭窄的挑战。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源包括J-PAS早期数据发布的光学窄带滤波观测数据、MaNGA积分视场单元(IFU)数据用于中心部分验证以及SDSS测光数据。
AI.method: 采用54个光学窄带滤光片和宽视场覆盖（计划8000平方度）的J-PAS系统填补了光谱分辨率与视场限制的缺口，并结合SDSS测光数据推导恒星族性质。
AI.result: J-PAS（Javalambre Physics of the Astronomical Structure）对PGC 3087775的分析表明其恒星种群金属丰度较低、消光适度且恒星形成历史（SFH）更快速，符合淬灭恒星种群特征。

title: Observational Constraints on Noncoincident $f(Q)$-Gravity with Matter-Gravity Coupling
comment: 18 pages, 8 figures, to appear in JHEAp
summary: We investigate $f\left( Q\right) $-gravity with a matter-gravity coupling as a geometric dark energy candidate for the description of the late-time cosmic acceleration within a spatially flat Friedmann--Lemaître-Robertson-Walker geometry. We select a noncoincident connection that naturally follows from the general framework of cosmological models with nonzero spatial curvature. We present observational constraints for the simplest $f\left( Q\right) =f_{0}Q^{n}$ model using data from Supernovae, Baryon Acoustic Oscillations and Cosmic Chronometers. For different data combinations we found consistent constraints, with a best-fit value for the power-law index $n\simeq2$. A comparison with the $Λ$CDM model shows that the $f\left( Q\right) $-gravity leads to larger values for the likelihood, while Akaike's Information Criterion suggests statistical equivalence between the two models for most data combinations.

AI.tldr: 研究通过观测数据约束了非对称联络的$f(Q)$引力（$f(Q)=f_0Q^n$）模型，发现其幂律指数最佳拟合值$n\simeq2$，在描述宇宙晚期加速膨胀时与ΛCDM模型具有统计等效性但似然值更高。
AI.background: 研究探索了物质-引力耦合的$f(Q)$引力理论作为几何暗能量候选者解释晚期宇宙加速膨胀的现象。
AI.data: 数据来源于超新星（Supernovae）、重子声波振荡（Baryon Acoustic Oscillations）和宇宙计时器（Cosmic Chronometers）。
AI.method: 采用非重合连接(noncoincident connection)的$f(Q)$引力理论框架，结合幂律模型$f(Q)=f_0Q^n$进行参数拟合。
AI.result: 在空间平坦的弗里德曼-勒梅特-罗伯逊-沃克几何框架下，$f(Q)$引力（f(Q)-gravity）作为几何暗能量候选者能够描述晚期宇宙加速膨胀，其幂律模型$f(Q)=f_0Q^n$的最佳拟合指数为$n\simeq2$，与ΛCDM模型相比具有更高的似然值但统计等价。

title: Axionlike dark-matter winds driven by galactic baryon redistribution
summary: We examine solutions of the hydrodynamic equations for dark matter (DM) modeled as a Bose-Einstein condensate (BEC) with axionlike interaction, forming a spherically symmetric halo in dwarf galaxies. Small perturbations and decoherence of the BEC DM arise from changes in the gravitational background induced by subgalactic baryonic processes. Focusing on the events in the central region of a galaxy, overlapping with the solitonic DM core, we consider three scenarios: (i) expansion of a gaseous shell mimicking stellar explosions, (ii) collapse of a shell modeling star formation, and (iii) contraction of a stellar cluster toward the galactic center, driven by dynamical friction within a gaseous shell. Numerical parameters are extracted from observational data for NGC 2366. Our results show central DM density increases of 0.01 percent and DM wind velocities of only a few meters per second. A greater increase in density is observed at lower wind speeds and vice versa. These results raise the question of whether minor DM variations significantly affect star formation. In analyzing the fate of the cumulative impact of baryonic processes, we turn to the quantum excitation model with a discrete spectrum in finite volume. In the inhomogeneous DM halo, including unstable phase, metastable excitations associated with false vacuum states decay on a timescale of 32 Myr. This induces the decay of the system's evolutionary operator. Meanwhile, the Beliaev damping, originating from the decay of stable quasiparticles, emerges in the next order of perturbation.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了矮星系中玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态(BEC)轴子型暗物质(DM)的流体动力学方程解，发现亚星系重子过程引发的微扰会导致中心DM密度增加0.01%和数米/秒的DM风速度，并揭示了32 Myr时间尺度的量子激发衰减现象。
AI.background: 研究探讨了暗物质(DM)作为具有类轴子(axionlike)相互作用的玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态(BEC)在矮星系中形成球对称晕时，其流体动力学方程的解及其受亚星系重子过程引力背景变化引发的微扰和退相干效应。
AI.data: 数据来源于对矮星系NGC 2366的观测数据（observational data for NGC 2366）以及基于玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体（Bose-Einstein condensate, BEC）暗物质（dark matter, DM）模型的数值模拟（numerical simulation）。
AI.method: 采用玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态(BEC)暗物质(DM)的流体动力学方程和量子激发模型(quantum excitation model)分析矮星系中球对称暗物质晕的微扰与退相干过程。
AI.result: 在矮星系中，玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态(BEC)暗物质(DM)的微扰和退相干源于亚星系重子过程引起的引力背景变化，导致中心DM密度增加0.01%和仅几米每秒的DM风速度。

title: A bending in the size-mass relation of star-forming galaxies across $0.5 < z < 6.0$ at a critical stellar mass of $10^{10}M_\odot$ revealed by JWST
comment: 20 pages,12 figures, resubmitted to Apjl after incorporating referee's comments
summary: Galaxy size provides key insights into the physical processes driving galaxy formation and evolution. Using deep JWST/NIRCam and MIRI imaging from the PRIMER survey, we investigate the rest-frame optical size-stellar mass relation of galaxies at $0.5 < z < 6.0$. We find that star-forming galaxies (SFGs) exhibit a broken power-law size-mass relation at all redshifts, with a nearly constant pivot mass ($M_{\rm p}$) of $\sim 10^{10} M_\odot$, and a slope flattening above $M_{\rm p}$. This highlights the prevalence of a population of compact, massive SFGs, likely underrepresented in previous studies. The size distribution of quiescent galaxies (QGs) is well described by a mixture power-law model, with the pivot mass increasing with redshift, from $M_{\rm p} \sim 10^{10.0} M_\odot$ at $z =0.75$ to $M_{\rm p} \sim 10^{10.5} M_\odot$ at $z = 2.6$, suggesting the minimum halo mass required to quench a high-mass QG increases with redshifts. The bending in the size-mass relation of SFGs supports two distinct size growth modes. At $M_{\star} < M_{\rm p}$, galaxy size growth is closely coupled to halo growth, while at $M_{\star} > M_{\rm p}$, an increasing fraction of SFGs decouple from halo growth and become more compact, likely associated with rapid bulge (and black hole) growth in $M_{\rm h} \gtrsim 10^{12} M_{\odot}$ halos. These compact SFGs are promising progenitors of massive QGs, as evidenced by their similar masses, surface brightness profiles, morphologies and number densities. These results suggests that the compaction pathway, rather than major mergers of extended SFGs, dominates the formation of massive QGs at $z \gtrsim 2$.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRCam和MIRI成像数据发现，恒星形成星系(SFGs)在$0.5 < z < 6.0$红移范围内存在拐点质量($M_{\rm p}$)恒定为$\sim 10^{10} M_\odot$的断幂律尺寸-质量关系，而静止星系(QGs)的拐点质量随红移增加，表明致密恒星形成星系是$z \gtrsim 2$大质量静止星系的主要前身星体，支持致密化路径主导其形成。
AI.background: 研究星系大小（galaxy size）与恒星质量（stellar mass）的关系，以揭示星系形成和演化过程中的物理机制，特别是星暴星系（SFGs）和静止星系（QGs）在不同红移下的尺寸增长模式及其与暗晕（halo）增长的关联。
AI.data: 使用PRIMER巡天的JWST/NIRCam和MIRI深度成像数据获取了0.5 < z < 6.0红移范围内星系的静止光学波段观测数据。
AI.method: 采用JWST/NIRCam和MIRI成像数据，通过分析静止波段光学尺寸-恒星质量关系（size-stellar mass relation）并拟合分段幂律（broken power-law）和混合幂律模型（mixture power-law model），研究了星系尺寸演化与质量的关系。
AI.result: 在$0.5 < z < 6.0$红移范围内，恒星形成星系(SFGs)呈现断裂幂律尺寸-质量关系，转折质量($M_{\rm p}$)稳定在$\sim 10^{10} M_\odot$，且高于$M_{\rm p}$时斜率变平，表明存在先前研究中低估的致密大质量恒星形成星系群体。

title: Kinky vortons in the 2HDM
comment: 15 pages, 14 figures, 2 tables
summary: We construct and analyse two-dimensional, current-carrying ring solutions, known as kinky vortons, in the $\mathbb{Z}_2$-symmetric global two-Higgs-doublet model (2HDM). We demonstrate the existence of multiple dynamically stable configurations that persist under non-axially symmetric perturbations. These solutions are described with high accuracy by the thin string approximation and elastic string formalism, which correctly capture both their equilibrium radii and dynamical oscillation frequencies. Kinky vortons in the $\mathbb{Z}_2$-symmetric theory establish the viability of vorton solutions in a phenomenologically motivated extension of the Standard Model, and should provide a computationally tractable proxy for vortons in the $U(1)$-symmetric 2HDM. In addition, we identify a composite domain wall configuration in which localized condensates are supported on secondary domain walls existing on a $\mathbb{Z}_2$ wall, suggesting a mechanism by which kinky-vorton-like defects could arise in a three dimensional setting.

AI.tldr: 在$\mathbb{Z}_2$对称全局双希格斯二重态模型(2HDM)中发现了多种动态稳定的环状电流解(kinky vortons)，并通过薄弦近似和弹性弦形式精确描述了其平衡半径和振荡频率，同时提出了一种由次级畴壁支撑局域凝聚的复合畴壁构型。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于在具有$\mathbb{Z}_2$对称性的全局双希格斯二重态模型(2HDM)中构建和分析携带电流的二维环形解（kinky vortons），探索其在标准模型现象学扩展中的稳定性与动力学特性。
AI.data: 数据来源于理论模拟（simulation）构建的$\mathbb{Z}_2$对称全局双希格斯二重态模型（2HDM）中的二维载流环状解（kinky vortons）及其复合畴壁构型。
AI.method: 采用薄弦近似（thin string approximation）和弹性弦形式（elastic string formalism）精确描述$\mathbb{Z}_2$对称全局双希格斯二重态模型（2HDM）中动态稳定的环形电流解（kinky vortons）的平衡半径和振荡频率。
AI.result: 在$\mathbb{Z}_2$对称的全局双希格斯二重态模型(2HDM)中构建并分析了携带电流的二维环形解(kinky vortons)，证明了存在多种在非轴对称扰动下保持动态稳定的构型。

title: Mainly on the Plane: Observing the Extended, Ionized Disks of Milky Way Analogs in IllustrisTNG
comment: 21 pages, 9 figures + appendices; Accepted to ApJ
summary: This paper explores the extent to which the circumgalactic medium (CGM) of Milky Way-like galaxies is located in an extended, ionized, disklike structure. To test this hypothesis, we analyze the spatial and kinematic distributions of different ion species within a sample of MW-like systems in IllustrisTNG. We model commonly observed ions (HI, MgII, SiIV, CIV and OVI) and calculate (1) their angular momentum misalignment from the star-forming disk ($θ$) and (2) the fraction of absorption consistent with galaxy rotation ($f_\mathrm{EWcorot}$). We find that 63% of MgII, 45% of SiIV, 38% of CIV, and 35% of OVI mass along the major axis have kinematics aligned with the galaxy angular momentum axis. We extend this to a mock absorption line survey and quantify $f_\mathrm{EWcorot}$. We find that $f_\mathrm{EWcorot}$(MgII) $\sim80\%$ and $f_\mathrm{EWcorot}$(OVI) $\sim60\%$ at $\sim0.5\ \mathrm{R_{200c}}$, in agreement with recent observational work. We find that in the typical MW analog, there is evidence of cool-warm material in an extended, corotating structure, regardless of whether the angular momentum or observational definition is used. Hence, we expect that the typical MW CGM, especially in the low ions, should be mainly on the plane.

AI.tldr: 研究发现银河系类似星系（Milky Way-like galaxies）的环星系介质（CGM）中低电离态物质（如MgII）主要分布在延展共转盘状结构中，且63%的MgII质量沿主轴运动学与星系角动量轴对齐。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于银河系类似星系周介质（circumgalactic medium, CGM）是否呈现延展电离盘状结构的科学问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于IllustrisTNG模拟中对银河系类似星系样本中不同离子（HI、MgII、SiIV、CIV和OVI）的空间和运动学分布分析。
AI.method: 采用角动量错位角（θ）和共转吸收比例（f_EWcorot）量化不同离子（HI、MgII、SiIV、CIV、OVI）在星系盘共转结构中的分布特征。
AI.result: 63%的MgII、45%的SiIV、38%的CIV和35%的OVI质量沿主轴的动力学与星系角动量轴对齐，表明典型银河系类似星系（MW-like）的环星系介质（CGM）尤其是低电离态物质主要分布在盘面上。

title: Little Red and Blue Dots: simply stratified Broad Line Regions
comment: Submitted to MNRAS. Comments are welcomed
summary: It has been claimed that a fraction of the so-called Little Red Dots (LRDs) are characterised by exponential broad line profiles, which have been ascribed to broadening from electron scattering by an ionised cocoon. In this work, we investigate the H$α$ broad line profiles of 32 AGN, including Little Red Dots (LRDs), Little Blue Dots (LBDs), and X-ray detected sources, using high SNR and resolution spectroscopy. We find that while single Gaussian models are statistically rejected, the exponential model is not universally preferred. Lorentzian and multi-Gaussian profiles provide equally good or superior fits for the majority of the sample, with no statistical preference for exponential profiles in $\sim$60% of cases across all AGN subtypes. There are indications that exponential profiles are preferred more frequently among LBDs, indicating that exponential profiles are not a prerogative of LRDs, which actually seem to more often favour Lorentzian profiles. Furthermore, we demonstrate that exponential wings can emerge naturally from the stratification of BLR clouds in virial motion, without invoking any scattering process. More generally, we also show that stacking multiple broad lines (either from multiple objects, as done in previous works, or from different BLR components within the same object) generally yields an exponential profile, even if none of the individual profiles are exponential. Explaining the exponential profiles in terms of BLR stratification solves various observational tensions with the electron scattering interpretation. While electron scattering may play a role, there is no evidence that it dominates the line profiles and that it significantly affects the inferred black hole masses.

AI.tldr: 研究发现Hα宽线轮廓（broad line profiles）在活动星系核（AGN）中普遍不符合单一高斯或指数模型，洛伦兹（Lorentzian）或多高斯拟合更优，且指数轮廓可能源于宽线区（BLR）分层而非电子散射主导。
AI.background: 研究探讨了活动星系核(AGN)中宽发射线(如Hα)的轮廓特征及其物理起源，特别是针对小红色点源(LRDs)和小蓝色点源(LBDs)的指数型轮廓是否普遍存在及其形成机制。
AI.data: 使用高信噪比（high SNR）和高分辨率光谱观测数据分析了32个活动星系核（AGN），包括小红点（LRDs）、小蓝点（LBDs）和X射线探测源。
AI.method: 采用高信噪比（high SNR）和高分辨率光谱技术分析Hα宽线轮廓，并比较单高斯（single Gaussian）、指数（exponential）、洛伦兹（Lorentzian）及多高斯（multi-Gaussian）模型拟合效果。
AI.result: 部分小蓝点(LBDs)更倾向于指数型轮廓，而小红点(LRDs)更多符合洛伦兹型轮廓。

title: Radial Velocity Orbital Solutions for Candidate Black Hole and Neutron Star Binary Systems in the Gaia Data Release 3 Catalog
comment: 25 pages, 15 figures, 4 tables. Submitted to AAS Journals
summary: We present spectroscopic followup observations of binary systems from the Gaia Data Release 3 (DR3) binary catalog that were selected to have large enough mass functions for their companions to be black holes or neutron stars. The selection includes 20 stars that are astrometric and/or spectroscopic binaries, as well as 11 stars with large accelerations both in the plane of the sky and along the line of sight but no DR3 orbital solution. We provide classifications for this entire sample, including radial velocity orbital solutions for 11 binaries. Apart from the previously published binaries Gaia BH1, Gaia BH2, and Gaia NS1, we show that the Gaia orbits are incorrect for all of the stars with candidate dark companions above 2 Msun. We suggest more conservative cuts on the significance and goodness of fit parameters that may be useful for identifying reliable orbital solutions in the tail of the binary star distribution. Although we find no new confirmed black hole or neutron star companions, one accelerating system has a minimum companion mass of 1.16 +/- 0.01 Msun that is likely to be a neutron star or an ultramassive white dwarf. The acceleration catalogs may therefore provide a largely unexplored source of additional wide binaries containing compact objects.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过光谱跟踪观测盖亚(Gaia) DR3双星目录中可能包含黑洞或中子星的大质量函数双星系统，发现除已知的Gaia BH1、Gaia BH2和Gaia NS1外，所有候选暗伴星质量超过2倍太阳质量的双星轨道解均存在错误，并提出更严格的筛选标准，同时在一个加速系统中发现可能为中子星或超质量白矮星的1.16倍太阳质量伴星。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用盖亚(Gaia)卫星DR3双星目录的光谱观测数据，搜寻具有大质量函数(暗示可能存在黑洞或中子星伴星)的双星系统。
AI.data: 数据来源为盖亚卫星第三次数据发布（Gaia Data Release 3, DR3）的双星系统目录，并针对其中可能包含黑洞或中子星伴星的大质量函数系统进行了光谱后续观测。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法包括对盖亚(Gaia) DR3双星目录中选定系统的光谱跟踪观测，结合天体测量和/或光谱双星数据，以及径向速度轨道解算方法。
AI.result: 在盖亚(Gaia) DR3双星目录中，所有候选暗伴星质量超过2倍太阳质量(Msun)的轨道解均存在错误，仅Gaia BH1、Gaia BH2和Gaia NS1三个已发表双星系统例外。

title: Hide and Seek with Gaia. Detectability of Predicted Thin-Disc Metal-Rich RR Lyrae Binaries in Gaia DR3 and DR4
comment: Submitted to A&A, comments welcome
summary: RR Lyrae stars (RRLs) are classical tracers of old stellar populations, yet growing evidence suggests the presence of a metal-rich ([Fe/H]>-0.5), intermediate-age (2-7 Gyr) sub-population in the Milky Way disc. Binary evolution, particularly stable mass transfer, has been proposed as a viable formation channel, predicting that most metal-rich, intermediate-age (<9 Gyr) RRLs should reside in binaries with orbital periods of ~900-2000 days. However, no genuine RRL binaries have been robustly identified, including in the Gaia DR3 astrometric binary catalogues, despite Gaia being sensitive to the predicted orbital-period range. We investigate whether the lack of detections in Gaia DR3 reflects an intrinsically low binary fraction or instead arises from observational biases. We analyse a carefully selected sample of 100 Gaia DR3 RRLs designed to trace the metal-rich population with thin-disc kinematics and compare them with predictions from binary evolution models. We generate realistic Gaia observation mocks, including variability-induced astrometric biases, and assess the detectability of binaries and the posterior constraints on the hidden binary fraction using astrometric quality indicators, such as RUWE, and a robust Bayesian inference. While current uncertainties prevent a definitive rejection of a high fraction of hidden binaries, our results reveal tensions between existing binary evolution predictions and the Gaia DR3 non-detections. This suggests either the presence of unaccounted systematics in the modelling of Gaia observations or the need to revise assumptions in binary evolution models. We predict that Gaia DR4 will significantly improve the binary detectability and provide powerful new constraints on the post-interaction binary populations.

AI.tldr: 研究发现金属丰度较高([Fe/H]>-0.5)的中龄(2-7 Gyr)天琴RR型变星(RRLs)在银河系薄盘中的双星比例与现有双星演化模型预测存在矛盾，提示需修正观测系统误差或模型假设。
AI.background: RR Lyrae变星（RRLs）作为古老恒星族群的经典示踪体，近期证据表明银河系盘存在金属丰度较高（[Fe/H]>-0.5）、中等年龄（2-7 Gyr）的子群体。
AI.data: 数据来源于盖亚卫星第三次数据释放（Gaia DR3）的天体测量双星目录，并针对100颗具有薄盘运动学特征的金属丰度较高RR Lyrae变星（RRLs）样本进行了分析，同时生成了包含变异性引起天体测量偏差的盖亚观测模拟数据。
AI.method: 采用基于盖亚(Gaia) DR3观测模拟的贝叶斯推断方法，结合变星引起的天体测量偏差和轨道周期探测效率分析，评估了金属丰度较高([Fe/H]>-0.5)的室女座RR型变星(RRL)双星系统的可探测性。
AI.result: 金属富集（[Fe/H]>-0.5）的中龄（2-7 Gyr）天琴RR型变星（RRLs）在银河系薄盘中的存在与现有双星演化模型预测存在矛盾，表明可能忽略了盖亚（Gaia）观测中的系统误差或需修正双星演化模型假设。

title: Isotopic Signature of Organic Molecules from Beyond the Solar System: An Enriched Methane D/H Ratio in the Interstellar Object 3I/ATLAS
summary: Interstellar objects are interlopers from other planetary systems, and their volatile compositions provide a glimpse into planet formation around their host star. We present near-infrared spectra of the coma of interstellar object 3I/ATLAS measured with the James Webb Space Telescope. Our results demonstrate an unexpectedly high $\mathrm{D}/\mathrm{H} = (3.31\pm0.34)\%$ for methane and represent an exceedingly rare detection of deuterated organic molecules in an interstellar object. This D/H ratio is a factor of $14\pm2$ higher than that measured in comet 67P/Churyumov-Gerasimenko by the Rosetta spacecraft, the only other comet for which CH$_3$D has been detected, yet the ratio of deuteration in methane compared with water is consistent for both comets within $1.2σ$. The D/H ratio in methane is observationally unconstrained in extrasolar sources to date, but the enriched ratio in 3I/ATLAS is most similar to those measured in other organic molecules toward primitive environments. The high D/H ratios of water and methane in 3I/ATLAS are a natural consequence of formation in a high D/H elemental ratio environment as a result of locally cold conditions in the protoplanetary disk and prior interstellar cloud. Thus, 3I/ATLAS formed in an environment very different from that in which our Sun and planets originated.

AI.tldr: 通过詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜观测发现星际天体3I/ATLAS彗发中甲烷的氘氢比（D/H）异常高（3.31±0.34%），表明其形成于原行星盘局部极冷环境且氘元素丰度远高于太阳系。
AI.background: 星际天体（interstellar objects）的挥发性成分可揭示其宿主恒星周围行星形成过程，是研究系外行星系统的重要窗口。
AI.data: 数据来源于詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（James Webb Space Telescope）对星际天体3I/ATLAS彗发进行的近红外光谱观测。

title: Coma Physics of an Interstellar Object: JWST Spatial-Spectral Mapping of 3I/ATLAS
summary: We report a survey of molecular emission from cometary volatiles using the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) toward interstellar object 3I/ATLAS carried out on UT 2025 December 22 and 23 at a heliocentric distance ($r_H$) of $2.37-2.41$ au. These measurements of CO, CO$_2$, H$_2$O, CH$_3$OH, and CH$_4$ sampled molecular chemistry in 3I/ATLAS as it receded from its encounter with our Sun and entered the vicinity of the H$_2$O ice line -- the region between $r_H$ = $2-3$ au where the temperature becomes too low for H$_2$O to vigorously sublime and CO and CO$_2$ begin to control the overall activity. CO was the most abundant molecule, followed by H$_2$O and CO$_2$, whose molecular abundances with respect to CO were $(44.4\pm0.7)\%$ and ($42.4\pm0.9)\%$, respectively. This work presents spatial-spectral maps of column density and rotational temperature as a function of distance from the nucleus for all detected species. The spatial distributions of both quantities were highly anisotropic for the apolar species in the coma of 3I/ATLAS, yet were more nearly symmetric for the polar molecules. These results demonstrate how volatiles were segregated in the nucleus ices of 3I/ATLAS and reveal heating and cooling mechanisms in its coma. Derived maps of the ortho-to-para ratio (OPR) for H$_2$O were flat with increasing distance from the nucleus and consistent with a coma-averaged value $\mathrm{OPR}=2.7\pm0.1$, slightly less than the expected equilibrium value of three.

AI.tldr: 利用詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）首次在星际天体3I/ATLAS远离太阳至日心距2.37-2.41天文单位（au）时探测到其挥发物中CO主导的分子丰度分布（CO占比最高，H₂O和CO₂相对丰度分别为44.4%和42.4%），并发现非极性分子在彗发中的空间分布呈现显著各向异性，而极性分子分布更对称，揭示了该天体冰核中挥发物的分馏机制及彗发加热冷却过程。

title: A New Method of Measuring Magnetic Field Strength in Highly Structured Protostellar Envelopes
comment: submitted to mnras
summary: Magnetic fields play a fundamental role in protostellar collapse and disk formation, yet direct measurements of magnetic field strength in deeply embedded protostellar envelopes remain difficult. We present a new method to estimate both the vertical and total magnetic field strength in collapsing, pseudodisk- or sheetlet-dominated protostellar envelopes, derived directly from the magnetohydrodynamic momentum equation. The method relates the magnetic field strength to two observationally accessible quantities: the projected gravitational acceleration toward the center of collapse and the face-on column density of the pseudodisk, and two dimensionless parameters, $a_{b, R}$ and $γ_{zR}$, which characterize magnetic contribution to the force balance and the field geometry, respectively, through $|B_z|=(2πa_{b,R}γ_{zR}g_RΣ)^{1/2}$. Using non-ideal magnetohydrodynamic simulations, we verify the assumptions underlying the method, justify the adopted approximations, and calibrate the two key dimensionless parameters. We provide canonical estimates of these two parameters, and show that they exhibit only weak spatial and temporal variations, allowing robust field strength estimates even when detailed gas kinematics or high-resolution polarization information is unavailable. We show that the method is applicable in both turbulent and non-turbulent envelopes and is insensitive to the ambipolar diffusion coefficient, making it robust against uncertainties in the local turbulence strength and ionization rate. We apply the method to the Class 0 source L1157, using column-density and gravitational-acceleration estimates from the literature to estimate the magnetic field strength for L1157. Our result is broadly consistent with previous estimates from independent methods, demonstrating the utility of this approach for constraining magnetic fields in embedded protostellar systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于磁流体动力学动量方程的新方法，通过观测可获取的投影引力加速度（g_R）和假想盘（pseudodisk）面密度（Σ）结合两个标定参数（a_{b,R}和γ_{zR}），直接估算原恒星包层（protostellar envelopes）中垂直和总磁场强度（B_z），并验证了该方法在湍流或非湍流环境中的普适性及对L1157的适用性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于原恒星(protostellar)坍缩和盘形成过程中磁场(magnetic field)强度的直接测量难题。
AI.data: 研究使用非理想磁流体动力学（non-ideal magnetohydrodynamic）模拟数据验证方法假设、校准关键参数并评估其时空变化特性。
AI.method: 基于磁流体动力学动量方程，通过观测可获取的投影重力加速度和假想盘（pseudodisk）面柱密度，结合表征磁力贡献的无量纲参数$a_{b, R}$和磁场几何参数$γ_{zR}$，建立垂直和总磁场强度的估算方法。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于磁流体动力学动量方程的新方法，通过观测可获取的伪盘（pseudodisk）面柱密度和坍缩中心投影重力加速度，结合两个表征磁力贡献与几何结构的无量纲参数（$a_{b,R}$和$γ_{zR}$），直接估算坍缩原恒星包层中的垂直与总磁场强度。

title: Generalized JMN Naked Singularity Models
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures
summary: We construct a generalized class of Joshi-Malafarina-Narayan (JMN) naked singularity spacetimes that arise as equilibrium end states of gravitational collapse with non-vanishing tangential pressure. The generalization introduces density inhomogeneity through a radially dependent mass function $F(r)=(M_0+M_n r^n)r^3$, leading to a two-parameter family of solutions matched smoothly to an exterior Schwarzschild spacetime. The observational properties of the spacetime are then examined through shadow formation and thin accretion disk emission. We find that when the photon sphere lies in the exterior Schwarzschild region, the shadow is identical to that of a Schwarzschild black hole. Accretion disk spectra show enhanced high-frequency emission compared to Schwarzschild, while deviations from the original JMN model remain small due to strong constraints on the inhomogeneity parameter. These results indicate that the generalized model effectively serves as a small perturbation of the JMN spacetime, demonstrating the robustness of JMN-type naked-singularity geometries.

AI.tldr: 构建了一类广义JMN裸奇点时空（generalized JMN naked singularity spacetimes），通过引入径向依赖质量函数$F(r)=(M_0+M_n r^n)r^3$形成双参数解族，发现其光子球在外部史瓦西区域时阴影与史瓦西黑洞相同，但吸积盘光谱高频辐射增强且非均匀性参数（inhomogeneity parameter）受限使偏离原始JMN模型较小，证实该广义模型可作为JMN时空的微扰并展现其几何鲁棒性。
AI.background: 研究探讨了具有非零切向压力的引力坍缩平衡终态下广义Joshi-Malafarina-Narayan（JMN）裸奇点时空的构建及其观测特性。
AI.data: 数据来源于对广义JMN裸奇点时空（JMN naked singularity spacetimes）的理论模拟（simulation），通过引入径向依赖的质量函数$F(r)=(M_0+M_n r^n)r^3$构建了两参数解族，并平滑匹配外部史瓦西时空（Schwarzschild spacetime）进行观测特性分析。
AI.method: 采用广义化的JMN裸奇点时空模型，引入径向依赖的质量函数$F(r)=(M_0+M_n r^n)r^3$构建具有非零切向压力的两参数解族，并平滑匹配外部史瓦西时空。
AI.result: 构建了一类广义化的JMN裸奇点时空（JMN naked singularity spacetimes），通过引入径向依赖的质量函数$F(r)=(M_0+M_n r^n)r^3$形成双参数解族，平滑匹配外部史瓦西时空（Schwarzschild spacetime），证实其作为JMN时空的小扰动保持几何鲁棒性。

title: Synchrotron Self-Absorption Spectral Modeling Reveals a Magnetically Driven Shock-in-Jet Scenario in Blazar 1156+295
comment: Accepted for publication in The Astrophysical Journal (ApJ). 20 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables
summary: Unveiling the launching and driving mechanisms of powerful jets in active galactic nuclei (AGNs) is crucial for understanding the co-evolution of supermassive black holes (SMBHs) and their host galaxies. 1156+295 is a blazar at a redshift of z=0.729 and exhibits significant variability in long-term radio monitoring. Using multi-frequency Effelsberg single-dish flux density data from 2007 to 2012, we performed synchrotron self-absorption (SSA) spectral modeling and extracted the turnover frequency and turnover flux density. By combining SSA spectral modeling with the core size and brightness temperature from quasi-simultaneous very long baseline interferometry (VLBI) images, we estimated the jet magnetic-field strength and magnetic flux, and investigated their temporal evolution in 1156+295. The evolution of radio flux density, spectral shape, and jet structure is consistent with the shock-in-jet framework. The inferred magnetic flux reaching or exceeding the magnetically arrested disk (MAD) threshold, together with evidence that magnetic energy release precedes the radio flares, supports a magnetically driven jet scenario. Overall, our results place magnetic-field measurements, spectral evolution, and inner-jet structural changes on a common timeline, providing observational constraints on their coupled evolution during flares.

AI.tldr: 通过多波段观测和同步自吸收谱分析，发现耀变体1156+295的射电耀变符合激波驱动框架，其磁通量达到或超过磁滞吸积盘（MAD）阈值，支持磁驱动喷流机制。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于揭示活动星系核（AGN）中喷流的产生和驱动机制，以理解超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）与其宿主星系的共同演化。
AI.data: 使用2007至2012年间的Effelsberg单天线多频段射电流量密度数据（radio monitoring）和准同时甚长基线干涉测量（VLBI）图像中的核区尺寸与亮度温度数据。
AI.method: 采用同步自吸收谱(SSA)建模结合甚长基线干涉(VLBI)测量的核区尺寸和亮度温度，估算喷流磁场强度和磁通量。
AI.result: 1156+295的射电光变、谱形演化与喷流结构变化符合激波驱动框架，磁通量达到或超过磁滞吸积盘（MAD）阈值且磁能释放先于射电耀斑，支持磁驱动喷流机制。

title: Southern eROSITA bubble as a forward shock and the low-metallicity CGM. South-east side story
comment: 14 pages, submitted to A&A
summary: Unlike the complicated X-ray and radio structure observed in the North Polar Spur area, the South-Eastern part of the eROSITA bubbles can be reasonably well described as a propagating forward shock, plausibly created by the transient energy release at the Galactic Center. In this model, the physical radius of the bubble is $R_{\rm b}\sim 7-8\,{\rm kpc}$ and the age of the outburst is $t_{\rm age}\sim 5-8\,{\rm Myr}$. The visible segment of the shock front (located at a distance of $\sim 10-12\,{\rm kpc}$ above the Galactic Disk and at a similar distance from the Sun) is currently expanding with the velocity $\sim 700\,{\rm km\,s^{-1}}$ through the gas with density $n_e\sim 3\times 10^{-4}\,{\rm cm^{-3}}$, and the abundance of heavy elements in this gas is $Z\lesssim 0.1 \times Z_\odot$. Unlike constraints derived from the line-of-sight-integrated quantities, these are effectively in situ measurements of the circumgalactic medium (CGM) properties. Given the simplifying assumptions used in deriving the density, we assign a factor of 2 systematic uncertainty to the final estimate. An eventual decisive test for the shock properties can be provided by the velocity measurements of the X-ray-emitting gas with soft X-ray bolometers. The extended forward shock propagating through low-metallicity gas is a favorable site to accelerate very high-energy cosmic rays, which might contribute to the observed proton-rich galactic cosmic ray component at PeV energies.

AI.tldr: 研究发现eROSITA气泡（eROSITA bubbles）东南部可描述为由银河系中心（Galactic Center）瞬态能量释放产生的传播前向激波（forward shock），其物理半径约7-8千秒差距（kpc）、年龄约5-8百万年（Myr），激波前沿正以约700公里/秒（km/s）速度穿过电子密度约3×10⁻⁴厘米⁻³（cm⁻³）、金属丰度≤0.1倍太阳值（Z⊙）的低金属丰度气体，为银晕介质（CGM）提供了原位测量数据，并可能是PeV能量级质子型宇宙线（cosmic rays）的加速场所。
AI.background: 研究探讨了银河系中心瞬时能量释放产生的正向激波（forward shock）在低金属丰度（Z≲0.1×Z⊙）的环银河介质（CGM）中传播的物理特性及其对极高能宇宙线加速的潜在贡献。
AI.data: 数据来源于对eROSITA气泡（eROSITA bubbles）东南部分的观测，通过测量激波前缘（shock front）的物理参数（如半径、膨胀速度、电子密度和重元素丰度）实现对星系周介质（CGM）的原位测量（in situ measurements）。
AI.method: 采用前向激波传播模型（forward shock）描述eROSITA气泡的东南部分，假设由银河系中心瞬时能量释放驱动。
AI.result: 南eROSITA气泡的东南部分可合理描述为由银河系中心瞬态能量释放产生的传播前向激波（forward shock），其物理半径约7-8千秒差距（kpc），爆发年龄约5-8百万年（Myr）。

title: Polytropes, logotropes, the universal value of the surface density of dark matter halos, and the value of the cosmological constant
summary: We discuss the connection between logotropes and polytropes in astrophysics and cosmology. The logotropic equation of state $P=A\ln(ρ/ρ_P)$ may be seen as a degenerate form of the polytropic equation of state $P=Kρ^γ$ in the limit $γ\rightarrow 0$, $K\rightarrow\infty$ with $A=Kγ$ fixed. The logotropic distribution function corresponds to the polytropic distribution function of index $γ=0$ for which the density is finite but the pressure diverges logarithmically. We show that the polytropic and logotropic distribution functions can be obtained in the nondegenerate limit of the Lynden-Bell theory of violent relaxation for a particular distribution of phase levels given by the $χ$-squared distribution. This provides a justification of the Tsallis entropy from the Lynden-Bell entropy. The logotropic distribution function presents a power-law energy tail decreasing as $ε^{-5/2}$. Interestingly, this ``universal'' power-law tail is predicted by recent kinetic theories of collisionless relaxation based on the coarse-grained Vlasov equation and on the secular dressed diffusion equation. When coupled to gravity, the associated density profile decreases as $r^{-1}$. This may explain the universal surface density of dark matter halos, or account for an effective NFW density cusp. This also accounts for the universal gravitational acceleration felt by a test particle and for the Tully-Fisher relation. The logotropic model can thus provide an alternative to the modification of Newtonian dynamics (MOND) theory. We recall how the logotropic model leads to a very accurate expression of the cosmological constant $Λ={G^2m_e^6}/{α^6\hbar^4}=1.36\times 10^{-52}\, {\rm m^{-2}}$ in terms of the mass of the electron and the fundamental constants of physics.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了天体物理学和宇宙学中对数温态（logotropes）与多方温态（polytropes）的联系，证明对数温态分布函数对应于指数γ=0的多方温态分布函数，其密度有限而压力对数发散，并通过对Lynden-Bell暴力弛豫理论在非简并极限下的分析，为Tsallis熵提供了基于Lynden-Bell熵的理论依据，同时表明对数温态模型能解释暗物质晕的普适表面密度、有效NFW密度尖峰、Tully-Fisher关系以及宇宙常数Λ的精确表达式，为修正牛顿动力学（MOND）理论提供了替代方案。
AI.background: 研究探讨了天体物理学和宇宙学中对数物态方程(logotropic equation of state)与多方物态方程(polytropic equation of state)的关联性及其在暗物质晕结构、宇宙学常数推导等领域的理论意义。
AI.data: 数据来源于理论推导（simulation），基于林登-贝尔（Lynden-Bell）暴力弛豫理论中的非简并极限，并采用卡方分布（χ-squared distribution）描述相空间能级分布。
AI.method: 采用对数物态方程(logotropic EOS)和多方物态方程(polytropic EOS)的关联分析，结合林登-贝尔(Lynden-Bell)暴力弛豫理论中的非简并极限推导分布函数。
AI.result: 对数状态方程(logotropic equation of state)是多方状态方程(polytropic equation of state)在极限条件下的退化形式，其中γ趋近于0且K趋近于无穷大时保持A=Kγ为固定值。

title: Detection of a Molecular Cloud toward the Heartbeating Gamma-ray Source near the Microquasar SS 433
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, accepted for publication in the Astrophysical Journal
summary: We report the detection of a molecular cloud, CO+40.05-2.40, positionally coincident with the "heartbeating" GeV source Fermi J1913+0515 at the northern boundary of the SS 433/W50 system. Millimeter and submillimeter spectroscopy with the Nobeyama 45 m telescope and the James Clerk Maxwell Telescope shows that the cloud has physical properties typical of quiescent dark clouds in the Galactic disk, with no evidence of shock heating or enhanced excitation. We examine possible high-energy emission mechanisms and find that the observed GeV luminosity cannot be accounted for by electron bremsstrahlung or hadronic interactions driven by relativistic particles originating from SS 433 under reasonable energetic assumptions. As an alternative, we propose that the gamma-rays may arise from a compact object embedded within the cloud and powered by Bondi-type accretion. In this framework, the reported heartbeat-like variability may reflect periodic modulation of the accretion flow by density waves induced by the precessing equatorial outflow of SS 433.

AI.tldr: 在SS 433/W50系统北部边界发现分子云CO+40.05-2.40与GeV源Fermi J1913+0515位置重合，提出其伽马射线可能源自云内致密天体通过邦迪吸积（Bondi-type accretion）机制产生，且心跳式变光可能由SS 433进动喷流（precessing equatorial outflow）激发的密度波对吸积流的周期性调制导致。
AI.background: 研究探讨了费米伽马射线源Fermi J1913+0515与分子云CO+40.05-2.40的关联性及其高能辐射机制。
AI.data: 数据来源于野边山（Nobeyama）45米望远镜和詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦望远镜（James Clerk Maxwell Telescope）的毫米波和亚毫米波光谱观测。
AI.method: 采用毫米波和亚毫米波光谱学（millimeter and submillimeter spectroscopy）结合野边山45米望远镜（Nobeyama 45 m telescope）和詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦望远镜（James Clerk Maxwell Telescope）观测数据，分析分子云物理特性并排除激波加热或增强激发可能性。
AI.result: result:在分子云CO+40.05-2.40中观测到的GeV辐射可能源于云内嵌藏的致密天体通过邦迪(Bondi)型吸积过程产生，其心跳式变光特性反映了SS 433进动喷流引发的密度波对吸积流的周期性调制。

title: A quasi-star is born: formation and evolution of accreting quasi-stars as a metallicity-independent pathway to Little Red Dots
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
summary: To investigate the rest-frame optical emission of "Little Red Dots", we model the formation of and evolution of quasi-stars, i.e. stellar envelopes supported by the accretion luminosity onto a central black hole, originating from rapidly accreting proto-stars reaching the supermassive star regime ($>10^4$ M$_{\odot}$) and undergoing general relativistic instability. We compute stellar evolution models with net mass gain rates $=0.01$, 0.1, and 1 M$_{\odot}$/yr and metallicities $Z=0$-0.01. For the mass gain rates $\ge 0.1$ M$_{\odot}$/yr, stars remain nearly fully convective with $T_\mathrm{eff}\sim4000$-9000~K. The general relativistic instability leading to central BH formation occurs at $M_\star\sim3.5\times10^4$ M$_{\odot}$ ($6.6\times10^4$ M$_{\odot}$) for $\dot{M}_{\rm acc}=0.1$ M$_{\odot}$/yr (1 M$_{\odot}$/yr), at luminosities $L \sim 10^9$ L$_{\odot}$. The lifetime of quasi-stars is estimated to be $10^7$-$10^8$~yr, $\sim$100-1000 times longer than their progenitors. In an environment allowing for rapid accretion the formation, evolution, and properties of quasi-stars are found be essentially independent of metallicity. Comparing the luminosities of our models with those of Little Red Dots at $z<4.5$ ($L_\mathrm{bol}\sim10^{9.5}$-$10^{11.5}$ L$_{\odot}$) yields quasi-star masses $10^{4.5}$-$10^{6.5}$ M$_{\odot}$. The observed minimum luminosity of $\sim10^{9.5}$~\Lsun\ implies accretion rates $\gtrsim0.1$ M$_{\odot}$/yr for Little Red Dots progenitors. Our models offer a metallicity-independent framework supporting quasi-stars as the source of Little Red Dot optical emission, and provide insights into their lifetimes, composition, and progenitor environment.

AI.tldr: 通过模拟准恒星（quasi-stars）的形成演化过程，发现其光度特征与红移z<4.5的"小红点"（Little Red Dots）观测数据匹配，支持准恒星作为其光学辐射源的解释框架，并揭示其质量范围为10^4.5-10^6.5 M⊙、寿命达10^7-10^8年且基本不受金属丰度影响。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过准恒星（quasi-stars）模型解释高红移（z<4.5）"小红点"（Little Red Dots）的静止光学辐射，探索超大质量恒星（>10^4 M⊙）在快速吸积（accretion）环境下演化至广义相对论不稳定性（general relativistic instability）并形成中心黑洞的物理过程。
AI.data: 研究使用恒星演化模型（stellar evolution models）模拟了净质量增加率（net mass gain rates）为0.01、0.1和1 M$_{\odot}$/yr且金属丰度（metallicity）Z=0-0.01的准恒星（quasi-stars）形成与演化过程。
AI.method: 采用恒星演化模型（stellar evolution models）计算净质量增加率（net mass gain rates）为0.01、0.1和1 M$_{\odot}$/yr及金属丰度（metallicity）Z=0-0.01条件下准恒星（quasi-stars）的形成与演化。
AI.result: 准星（quasi-stars）在质量吸积率≥0.1 M$_{\odot}$/yr时保持近全对流状态，有效温度（$T_\mathrm{eff}$）为4000-9000 K，广义相对论不稳定性导致中心黑洞形成时的恒星质量（$M_\star$）为3.5×10$^4$ M$_{\odot}$（吸积率0.1 M$_{\odot}$/yr）或6.6×10$^4$ M$_{\odot}$（吸积率1 M$_{\odot}$/yr），对应光度（$L$）约10$^9$ L$_{\odot}$。
